english: Hey, you wanna get something to eat or uh, do you wanna see how long we can throw this ball back and forth? Huh?

chinese: 嗯，那个球的东西。

name: train_dia18_utt4
chinese: 嗯，
english: Uhh,

name: train_dia18_utt5
chinese: 好的！

name: train_dia18_utt6
chinese: 哦哦。

name: train_dia18_utt7
chinese: 什么？

name: train_dia18_utt8

english: I have to pee. And Rachel's in the bathroom!

name: train_dia18_utt9
chinese: 男人，我没想到我们会成功！

name: train_dia18_utt10
chinese: 我知道！不要换手，好吗？
english: I know!  Don't switch hands, okay?

name: train_dia19_utt0
chinese: 嘿。

name: train_dia19_utt1
chinese: 嘿！

name: train_dia20_utt2
chinese: 耶！！哦，所以，你不再生我们的气了吗？
english: Yay!! Oh so, you're not, you're not mad at us anymore?

name: train_dia20_utt3
chinese: 不！

name: train_dia20_utt4
chinese: 不！
english: No!

name: train_dia20_utt5
chinese: 不！
english: No!

name: train_dia20_utt6
chinese: 你们完全是对的！
english: You guys were totally right!

name: train_dia20_utt7
chinese: 这次比我们第一次出去好太多了。

name: train_dia20_utt8
chinese: 你知道吗？

chinese: 那真是太尴尬了，我们非常紧张。

name: train_dia20_utt10
chinese: 你们没有一起睡觉吗？

name: train_dia20_utt11
chinese: 是的，那真的让我平静下来。
english: Yeah, that really calms me down.

name: train_dia20_utt12
chinese: 嗨！
english: And!

name: train_dia20_utt13
chinese: 我们有很多共同之处！
english: We have so much in common!

name: train_dia20_utt14
chinese: 她喜欢三明治、运动，虽然她是一个大都会队的球迷，现在不是什么大问题，但如果我们有孩子，那就是一个问题了。
english: She loves sandwiches, sports, although she is a Met fan, not much of an issue now but if we were ever to have kids, well that's a

name: train_dia20_utt15
chinese: 哦，我的天啊！听你说起要生孩子。哦，我的乔伊。哦，请不要在我之前结婚。
english: Oh my God! Listen to you talkin' about having kids. Oh my Joey.  Oh, please don't get married before I do.

name: train_dia20_utt16
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: train_dia21_utt0
chinese: 她是怎么做到的？
english: How does she do that?

name: train_dia21_utt1
chinese: 我不能在公共场所睡觉。
english: I cannot sleep in a public place.

name: train_dia21_utt2
chinese: 你能看看她吗？她是如此平静。
english: Would you look at her? She is so peaceful.

name: train_dia21_utt3
chinese: 哦！什么什么什么！...嗨。
english: Oh! What what what! ...Hi.

name: train_dia21_utt4
chinese: 没关系，你知道的，你又打盹了。
english: It's okay, y'know, you just nodded off again.

name: train_dia21_utt5
chinese: 你怎么了？
english: What's going on with you?

name: train_dia21_utt6
chinese: 我昨晚没睡觉！
english: I got no sleep last night!

name: train_dia21_utt7
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: train_dia21_utt8
chinese: 我的祖母有一个新男朋友，他们在床上都有点不安全。
english: My grandmother has this new boyfriend, and they're both kind of insecure in bed.

name: train_dia21_utt9
chinese: 哦，而且聋。
english: Oh, and deaf.

name: train_dia21_utt10
chinese: 所以他们不断地互相安慰，告诉对方他们玩得很开心。
english: So they're constantly, like, having to reassure each other that they're having a good time.

name: train_dia21_utt11
chinese: 你们不知道他们有多吵！
english: You have no idea how loud they are!

name: train_dia21_utt12
chinese: 好的，如果你愿意的话，你可以今晚和Rachel和我一起住。
english: Well, if you want, you can stay with Rachel and me tonight.

name: train_dia21_utt13
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: train_dia22_utt0
chinese: 呃！那是什么？有东西爆炸了！
english: Ew! What is that? Something exploded!

name: train_dia22_utt1
chinese: 这只是她的羊水破裂了。冷静点，好吗？
english: It's just her water breaking. Calm down, will you?

chinese: 水破了，你是什么意思？那是什么，水破了？
english: Water breaking, what do you mean? What's that, water breaking?

name: train_dia22_utt3
chinese: 呼吸，呼吸，呼吸。
english: Breathe, breathe, breathe.

name: train_dia23_utt0
chinese: 你疯了吗？我的意思是乔伊，他会杀了你，他真的会把你杀死。
english: Are you insane? I mean Joey, is going to kill you, he's actually going to kill you dead.

name: train_dia23_utt1
chinese: 好的！你不认为我考虑过那个吗？
english: Okay! You don't think I thought of that?

name: train_dia23_utt2
chinese: 你怎么可能不知道哪一个？
english: How can you not know which one?

name: train_dia23_utt3
chinese: 我是说那真是难以置信。
english: I mean that's unbelievable.

name: train_dia23_utt4
chinese: 我的意思是，是吉娜吗？
english: I mean, was it Gina?

name: train_dia23_utt5
chinese: 哪一个是吉娜？
english: Which one is Gina?

name: train_dia23_utt6
chinese: 黑色的，大头发，带着飞机耳环。
english: Dark, big hair, with the airplane earrings.

name: train_dia23_utt7
chinese: 不，不，不，那是迪娜。
english: No, no, no, that's Dina.

name: train_dia23_utt8
chinese: 你看，你也分不清哪一个是哪一个，dwha!!
english: You see you can't tell which one is which either, dwha!!

name: train_dia24_utt0
chinese: 我不知道，你认为“周六见”很有趣。
english: I don't know, you thought See you Saturday' was funny.

name: train_dia24_utt1
chinese: 亲爱的，看，马克很时尚，好吗？我喜欢有一个可以和他分享这些东西的朋友。
english: Look honey, Mark is in fashion okay, I like having a friend that I can share this stuff with.

name: train_dia24_utt2
chinese: 你们肯定不想和我一起去听讲座。
english: You guys would never want to go to a lecture with me.

name: train_dia24_utt3
chinese: 噗哈！！我很愿意和你一起去。
english: Pa-haa!! I would love to go with you.

name: train_dia24_utt4
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really!?

name: train_dia24_utt5
chinese: 是的，嘿，我有衣服，我甚至还挑选它们。
english: Yeah, hey I-I have clothes, I even pick them out.

name: train_dia24_utt6
chinese: 我是说，就你所知，我可能是一个时尚...追求者。
english: I mean for, for all you know I could be a fashion..... monger.

name: train_dia24_utt7
chinese: 好的。亲爱的，我希望你能和我一起去。什么？
english: Okay. Honey, I would love for you to go with me.  What?

chinese: 我现在应该穿什么，我现在很紧张。
english: What should I wear, now I'm all nervous.

name: train_dia25_utt0
chinese: 我知道，我们做到了！嘿，那太不可思议了，对吧？！
english: : I know, we did it!! Hey, that was incredible, huh?!

name: train_dia25_utt1
chinese: 我知道，太棒了！我的意思是，我们完全做到了，太美了。
english: I know, it was amazing! I mean, we totally nailed it, it was beautiful.

name: train_dia25_utt2
chinese: 谢谢你，听着，非常感谢Tribbiani。哦天啊，看看时间，我得赶上去参加舞会的公交车。
english: : Thank you, listen, thanks a lot Tribbiani, . Oh my God, look at the time, I gotta catch the bus to the ball.

name: train_dia25_utt3
chinese: 哦，好吧，祝你好运。
english: Oh well, okay, good luck.

name: train_dia25_utt4
chinese: 是的。
english: : Yeah.

chinese: 除非你想再练习一遍福克斯特罗？或者或者探戈？
english: Unless you wanna practice the Foxtrot again? Or-or the Tango?

name: train_dia25_utt6
chinese: 啊，谢谢，但是不用了。你看，我觉得我已经准备好和女孩子跳舞了。
english: : Ahh, thanks but no. You see I-I think I'm ready to dance with girls.

name: train_dia25_utt7
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: train_dia25_utt8
chinese: 是的。
english: : Yeah.

name: train_dia25_utt9
chinese: 去吧，特里格。
english: Go get em Treeger.

chinese: 好的。嘿，你想来吗？玛吉有一个女朋友。
english: : Right.  Hey, ahh, you wanna come? Marge has a girlfriend.

chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: train_dia25_utt12
chinese: 是的，你可以和她跳得很好，她和我一样高。
english: : Yeah, you could dance real good with her, she's the same size as me.

name: train_dia25_utt13
chinese: 不，我很好。
english: No, I'm good.

chinese: 哦天啊，这太让人紧张了！怎-怎么做呢？
english: Oh God, this is so nerve wracking! How-how do you do this?

chinese: 很不幸，我没有得到很多回复。
english: Well, unfortunately, I don't get many callbacks so

chinese: 谁知道？

chinese: 好的，嗯，我们已经缩小范围，剩下的是雷蒙德、本、凯尔和乔伊。其他的，非常感谢你们。
english: Okay uh, we have narrowed it down to Raymond, Ben, Kyle, and Joey. The rest of you, thank you very much.

name: train_dia26_utt5

english: Yes!! I knew it!!  Bye-bye! So long! Later!

chinese: 哦，这太棒了！我可能真的能扮演本的爸爸！
english: Oh this is great! I might actually get to play Ben's dad!

name: train_dia26_utt7
chinese: 是的！
english: Yeah!

english: Actually, that can't happen.

chinese: 是的，因为你们的外貌都很不同，我们将你和雷蒙放在一起，将凯尔和本放在一起。
english: Yeah because you all have such different looks, we're putting you with Raymond and Kyle with Ben.

name: train_dia26_utt10
chinese: 所以要么是你们两个，要么是你们两个。
english: So it'll be either you two  or you two.

chinese: 伙计，这会有点奇怪。

name: train_dia26_utt12
chinese: 是的，是的。

english: Okay, come on, I can't get married until I get something old, something new, something borrowed, and something blue.

chinese: 好的，好的，好的，好的！好的！好的，这里有一些东西，这里有一些蓝色和新的东西。
english: Okay, all right, all right, all right! Okay!  Okay, here's something, here's something blue and new.

name: train_dia28_utt0
chinese: 请！

chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？

english: I-I hurt three huge men, I gave a guy a bloody nose I mean I-I'm not proud of it but, I really am.

name: train_dia28_utt3
chinese: 而这一切都是因为你，美好的、令人惊叹的你。
english: And it's all because of you, wonderful, amazing you.

name: train_dia28_utt4
chinese: 我觉得你可能有脑震荡。
english: I think you've got concussion.

name: train_dia28_utt5
chinese: 不，不，我是认真的。谢谢。
english: No, no, I'm serious. Thank you.

name: train_dia28_utt6
chinese: 不客气。对不起。我伤到你了吗？
english: You're welcome.  I'm sorry. Did I hurt you?

name: train_dia28_utt7
chinese: 值得付出痛苦。你知道吗，你知道吗？其实不值得。
english: It's worth the pain.  Y'know what, you know what? It's not.

name: train_dia29_utt0
chinese: 哇！那个迈克的事情很有趣！我不知道菲比和大卫会发生什么。
english: Wow! That Mike thing was interesting! I don't know what's gonna happen with Phoebe and David.

name: train_dia29_utt1
chinese: 我想要！想要一个提示吗？嗯？"我想要" "我想要"。
english: I do! Want a hint? huh? "I do"  "I do".

name: train_dia29_utt2
chinese: 好的，我感觉这是一种文字游戏，因为你满脸红润地控制着喜悦。
english: Ok, I'm sensing that this is some kind of word play, because you are pink with barely controlled glee.

name: train_dia29_utt3
chinese: 大卫打算向菲比求婚。
english: David is going to propose to Phoebe.

name: train_dia29_utt4
chinese: 什么？为什么？
english: What?  Why?

name: train_dia29_utt6
chinese: 钱德勒，我们已经谈过这个了。
english: Chandler, we have talked about this.

name: train_dia29_utt7
chinese: 你不应该给别人提建议！
english: You are not supposed to give people advice!

name: train_dia29_utt8
chinese: 现在，你难道不能开个不合适的玩笑吗？
english: Now couldn't you just have made some sort of inappropriate joke?

name: train_dia29_utt9
chinese: 我
english: I

name: train_dia29_utt10
chinese: 他们只约会了几个星期，菲比对迈克完全着迷！
english: They've only been going out for a few weeks and Phoebe is completely hung up on Mike!

name: train_dia29_utt11
chinese: 她会说“不”，大卫的心会碎，他们很难从中恢复过来，然后菲比最终会孤独一人。
english: She'll say "No", David's heart will be broken, it will be too hard for them to recover from and then Phoebe will end up alone

name: train_dia29_utt12
chinese: 男人，那真是一些。
english: Man, that's some

name: train_dia29_utt13
chinese: 哦，那不是你想要的...
english: Oh, that's not what you want...

name: train_dia30_utt0
chinese: 这是我的父亲，保罗·史蒂文斯。爸爸，这是罗斯·盖勒。
english: This is my father, Paul Stevens. Dad, this is Ross Geller.

name: train_dia30_utt1
chinese: 很高兴见到你，保罗。
english: It-it's great to meet you Paul.

name: train_dia30_utt2
chinese: 我通常更喜欢伊丽莎白的男朋友称呼我为史蒂文斯先生。
english: I usually prefer Elizabeth's boyfriends to address me as Mr. Stevens.

name: train_dia30_utt3
chinese: 当然，当然，史蒂文斯先生。
english: Of course, of course, Mr. Stevens.

name: train_dia30_utt4
chinese: 罗斯，你有什么问题？
english: So Ross, what your problem?

name: train_dia30_utt5
chinese: 对不起，你好吗？
english: Eh-wh Excuse me?

name: train_dia30_utt6
chinese: 为什么你不能找一个和你同龄的女朋友？
english: Why can't you get a girlfriend your own age?

name: train_dia30_utt7
chinese: 那很有趣。嗯，这不好笑。
english: That's funny. Umm.  It's not funny.

name: train_dia30_utt8
chinese: 我
english: I

name: train_dia30_utt9
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: train_dia30_utt10
chinese: 我可以，我可以看到那个。
english: I can, I can see that.

name: train_dia30_utt11
chinese: 嗯，但是我认为如果你给我一个机会，我可以改变你的想法。
english: Umm, but I think if you give me umm, one chance I can, I can change your mind.

name: train_dia30_utt12
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: train_dia30_utt13
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia30_utt14
chinese: 好的。我会给你一个机会来改变我的想法。你有一分钟的时间。
english: Okay. I'll give you one chance to change my mind.  You got one minute.

name: train_dia30_utt15
chinese: 爸爸！

name: train_dia31_utt0

english: Oh well, it's not on TV yet.

chinese: 好的，那么它还没有挂在墙上。

name: train_dia32_utt0
chinese: 哦哦哦！

name: train_dia32_utt1
chinese: 哦，是的，我确定。突然间，他的手不再是问题了。
english: Oh yeah, I'm sure.  And all of a sudden his hands weren't the problem anymore.

chinese: 你想闻他的味道吗？
english: You wanna smell him?

name: train_dia47_utt15
chinese: 哦，是的。他有那种很好闻的婴儿味道。闻一下他的头。
english: Oh, yeah. He's got that great baby smell. Get a whiff of his head.

name: train_dia47_utt16
chinese: 我告诉过你什么？我告诉过你什么？
english: What'd I tell you? What'd I tell you?

name: train_dia47_utt17
chinese: 嗯，我们是很棒的人。
english: Well, we are great guys.

name: train_dia48_utt0
chinese: 再见。
english: Bye.

name: train_dia49_utt0
chinese: 嗯，不是真的。
english: Well, not really.

name: train_dia49_utt1
chinese: 我的意思是从技术上讲，这并不违反规则或任何事情，但这是不受欢迎的。
english: I mean technically it's-it's not against the rules or anything, but it is frowned upon.

name: train_dia49_utt2
chinese: 尤其是昨晚我们遇到的那位教授，Judgey von Holierthanthou。
english: Especially by that professor we ran into last night, Judgey von Holierthanthou.

name: train_dia49_utt3
chinese: 罗斯，你要小心了。你不想被称为“麦克奈尔教授的学生”，你知道的。
english: Well Ross, you be careful now. You don't want to get a reputation as y'know Professor McNailshisstudents.

name: train_dia49_utt4
chinese: 是的。我应该做什么？
english: Yeah. What-what should I do?

name: train_dia49_utt5
chinese: 嗯，罗斯，看起来相当明显。
english: Well Ross, it seems pretty clear.

name: train_dia49_utt6
chinese: 我是说什么更重要？
english: I mean what's more important?

name: train_dia49_utt7
chinese: 人们怎么想或者你感觉如何，嗯？
english: What people think or how you feel, huh?

name: train_dia49_utt8
chinese: 罗斯，你必须跟随你的内心。
english: Ross, you gotta follow your heart.

name: train_dia49_utt9
chinese: 乔伊，那真是太甜蜜了。
english: Joey that is so sweet.

name: train_dia49_utt10
chinese: 嘿。
english: Hey.

name: train_dia49_utt11
chinese: 嘿嘿嘿！那么，你和Dana怎么样了？有没有什么理由让我留出一大段时间，比如说星期四？
english: Hey-hey-hey! So, how did it go with Dana? Any reason I should leave a block of time open say Thursday?

name: train_dia49_utt12
chinese: 我做不到。
english: I couldn't do it.

name: train_dia49_utt13
chinese: 你做不到吗？！
english: You couldn't do it?!

name: train_dia49_utt14
chinese: 嘿，放松点，我只是需要更多时间。我们今晚要去吃晚饭。
english: Hey, relax I just need more time. We're going to dinner tonight.

name: train_dia49_utt15
chinese: 什么？！你又和她出去了！
english: What?! You're going out with her again!

name: train_dia49_utt16
chinese: 和谁一起出去？
english: Going out with who?

name: train_dia49_utt17
chinese: 嗯，我是来自大学的Dana Keystone。
english: Uh, Dana Keystone from college.

name: train_dia49_utt18
chinese: 哦，是的！她不是吗？嗯
english: Oh yeah! Wasn't she uh

name: train_dia49_utt19
chinese: 不，那是Dana Caplin。
english: No, that was Dana Caplin.

name: train_dia49_utt20
chinese: 乔伊！你甚至都不认识她！
english: Joey! You didn't even know her!

name: train_dia49_utt21
chinese: 啊，随便吧！
english: Ah whatever!

name: train_dia50_utt0
chinese: 早上好！嘿，我最喜欢的天才和我的小机器人伙伴怎么样了？！
english: Morning! Hey, how's my favorite genius and my little robot buddy?!

name: train_dia50_utt1
chinese: 不要碰他！
english: Don't touch him!

name: train_dia50_utt2
chinese: 好的！
english: Okay!

name: train_dia50_utt3
chinese: 好的。
english: All right.

name: train_dia50_utt4
chinese: 嗯，好的韦恩，跟我坦白吧。
english: Umm, all right Wayne, level with me.

name: train_dia50_utt5
chinese: 我-我一直听到这些传言，说我可能会被解雇。
english: I-I keep hearing all these rumors that I might get fired.

name: train_dia50_utt6
chinese: 好的，他们甚至请演员来为我的角色试镜！
english: Okay, they even have actors coming in to read for my part!

name: train_dia50_utt7
chinese: 来吧，伙计，你必须给我一个第二次机会！
english: Come on man, you-you got to give me a second chance!

name: train_dia50_utt8
chinese: 我是说，我爱-我爱这个小家伙！
english: I mean, I love-I love this little guy!

name: train_dia50_utt9
chinese: 啊-啊！！
english: Ah-ah!!

name: train_dia50_utt10
chinese: 好的，所以你不想让我碰他是对吗？
english: Okay, that's why you didn't want me to touch him right?

name: train_dia50_utt11
chinese: 给你！
english: Here you go!

name: train_dia50_utt12
chinese: 好吗？
english: Okay?

name: train_dia50_utt13
chinese: 愚蠢的！
english: Stupid!

name: train_dia50_utt14
chinese: 我简直不敢相信！
english: I can't believe it!

name: train_dia50_utt15
chinese: 上帝！
english: God!

name: train_dia50_utt16
chinese: 嘿，你好吗？
english: Hey, how you doin'?

name: train_dia51_utt0
chinese: 嘿。
english: Hey.

name: train_dia51_utt1
chinese: 嗨。嗯，关于之前发生的事情...
english: Hi. Look um, about what happened earlier...

name: train_dia51_utt2
chinese: 不，嘿，嗯，我完全理解。你当时很紧张。
english: No, hey, well, I-I completely understand. You were, you were stressed.

name: train_dia51_utt3
chinese: 我本来打算给你一个道歉的机会。
english: I was gonna give you a chance to apologise to me.

name: train_dia51_utt4
chinese: 为什么？为了让你把我赶出你的办公室？
english: For what? For letting you throw me out of your office?

name: train_dia51_utt5
chinese: 你没有
english: You had no

name: train_dia51_utt6
chinese: 是的，好吧，对不起，我想在我们的纪念日和我的女朋友在一起，我真是个混蛋。
english: Yeah, well excuse me for wanting to be with my girlfriend on our anniversary, boy what an ass am I.

name: train_dia51_utt7
chinese: 但是我告诉过你，我没有时间！
english: But I told you, I didn't have the time!

name: train_dia51_utt8
chinese: 是的，你从来没有时间。我的意思是，我感觉我甚至不再有女朋友了，Rachel。
english: Yeah, well you never have the time. I mean, I don't feel like I even have a girlfriend anymore, Rachel.

name: train_dia51_utt9
chinese: 嗨，罗斯，你想从我这里得到什么？
english: Wh, Ross what do you want from me?

name: train_dia51_utt10
chinese: 你想要我，你想让我辞掉工作，这样你就能感觉有一个女朋友了吗？
english: You want me, you want me to quit my job so you can feel like you have a girlfriend?

name: train_dia52_utt0
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: train_dia52_utt1
chinese: 哦，我得告诉你一件事。
english: Ooh, I have to tell you something.

name: train_dia52_utt2
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia52_utt3
chinese: 但是我不能告诉你。
english: But I can't tell you.

name: train_dia52_utt4
chinese: 好的，但是如果你必须告诉我一些你可以告诉我的事情，那不是更容易吗？
english: Okay, but wouldn't it be easier if you had to tell me something that you could tell me.

name: train_dia52_utt5
chinese: 嗯，在一个完美的世界里当然可以。但是，不，我答应过不会说出来，并且我向所有的神发誓。
english: Well, sure in a perfect world. But, no, I promised I wouldn't tell, and I swore to like all my gods.

name: train_dia52_utt6
chinese: 好的。这与罗斯和瑞秋有关吗？
english: Okay. Does it have to do with Ross and Rachel?

name: train_dia52_utt7
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: train_dia52_utt8
chinese: 这与乔伊有关吗？
english: Does it have to do with Joey?

name: train_dia52_utt9
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: train_dia52_utt10
chinese: 这与钱德勒和他床边放着的那只袜子有关吗？
english: Does it have to do with-with Chandler and that sock that he keeps by his bed?

name: train_dia52_utt11
chinese: 不，但我们稍后再回来谈这个！
english: No, but let's come back to that later!

name: train_dia53_utt0
chinese: 嗨！
english: Hi!

name: train_dia53_utt1
chinese: 理查德！
english: Richard!

name: train_dia53_utt2
chinese: 实际上，我不是来夸厨师的。
english: Actually, I'm not here to complement the chef.

name: train_dia53_utt3
chinese: 哦，那没关系，我讨厌人们回来夸厨师。
english: Ohh Oh, that's okay I hate when people come back to complement the chef.

name: train_dia53_utt4
chinese: 就好像我没有更好的事情要做一样！
english: Like I have nothing better to do!

name: train_dia53_utt5
chinese: 所以，有什么事吗？
english: So what's up?

name: train_dia53_utt6
chinese: 嗯，上次晚上见到你真是太好了。
english: Well, it was great seeing you the other night.

name: train_dia53_utt7
chinese: 哦，很高兴也见到你。你是来这里告诉我这个的吗？
english: Oh, good to see you too. Did you come down here to tell me that?

name: train_dia53_utt8
chinese: 不！我来这里是为了告诉你另外一件事。我来这里是为了告诉你我依然爱你。
english: No! I came here to tell you something else.  I came here  to tell you I still love you.

name: train_dia54_utt0
chinese: 一次只能有一位孕妇，请！我只希望你没事。
english: One pregnant woman at a time, please! I just want you to be okay.

name: train_dia54_utt1
chinese: 所以强迫她嫁给Bobby会实现这个吗？
english: So forcing her to marry Bobby is gonna make that happen?

name: train_dia54_utt2
chinese: 也许！嗯！嗯，那么，Numb Nuts喔，算了吧！我不行！
english: Maybe!  Well! Wellso-so uh, what kind of music does Numb Nuts Oh forget it! I can't!

name: train_dia54_utt3
chinese: 乔伊，我对此感到非常害怕。
english: Joey, I am scared to death about this.

name: train_dia54_utt4
chinese: 但是我真的认为我能做到，我只是需要一些帮助。
english: But I really think I can do it, I'm just gonna need some help.

name: train_dia54_utt5
chinese: 并且Bobby会一直在这里。
english: And Bobby's gonna be here the whole time.

name: train_dia54_utt6
chinese: 当然！回答你之前的问题，我们是纯粹的黑帮说唱。
english: You bet I am!  And to answer your earlier question, we're straight-up gangster rap.

name: train_dia54_utt7
chinese: 看，Rachel告诉我你为她做了多么容易。为什么你不能为我做同样的事情呢？
english: Look, Rachel's told me how much easier you've made all this on her. Why can't you do that for me?

name: train_dia54_utt8
chinese: 因为！因为因为你是我的妹妹！
english: Because! Cause Cause you're my baby sister!

name: train_dia54_utt9
chinese: 而你是我的大哥哥！
english: And you're my big brother!

name: train_dia54_utt10
chinese: 我的意思是，你是我在整个世界中最喜欢的人。
english: I mean, you're my favorite guy in the whole world.

name: train_dia54_utt11
chinese: 我甚至不怕告诉妈妈和爸爸。
english: I'm not even scared to tell mom and dad.

name: train_dia54_utt12
chinese: 我害怕告诉你。
english: I was scared of telling you.

name: train_dia54_utt13
chinese: 嗯，我会害怕他们，但没关系。
english: Well I'd be scared of them, but all right.

name: train_dia54_utt14
chinese: 乔伊，我无法忍受你生气的时候和你一起生这个孩子的想法。
english: Joey, I can't stand the thought of having this baby with you mad at me.

name: train_dia54_utt15
chinese: 我希望他能拥有他的叔叔。
english: I want him to have his uncle.

name: train_dia54_utt16
chinese: 我的宝宝会有他的乔伊叔叔吗？
english: Is my baby gonna have his Uncle Joey?

name: train_dia54_utt17
chinese: 当然，他会有他的乔伊叔叔！
english: Of course he's gonna have his Uncle Joey!

name: train_dia54_utt18
chinese: 我们会没事的。我的意思是，即使我们没有结婚，这个宝宝也会被如此爱着。不仅仅是我们。
english: We're gonna be all right. I mean, even if we're not married this baby is gonna be so loved. Not just by us.

name: train_dia54_utt19
chinese: 没错！还是他的叔叔！
english: That's right! By his uncle too!

name: train_dia54_utt20
chinese: 而且是你。
english: And by you.

name: train_dia54_utt21
chinese: 好的，鲍比，为什么我们不过来，让他们有一点时间。
english: Okay Bobby, why don't we just come over here and let them have a little moment.

name: train_dia54_utt22
chinese: 过来！
english: Come here!

name: train_dia54_utt23
chinese: 不！说真的！你怎么了？！
english: No! Seriously! What's wrong with you?!

name: train_dia55_utt0
chinese: 今晚我过得非常愉快。
english: I had a really nice time tonight.

name: train_dia55_utt1
chinese: 我也是。我真的很高兴莫妮卡邀请我们出去。
english: So did I. I'm really glad Monica asked us out.

name: train_dia55_utt2
chinese: 我很想邀请你进来，但是，我的姐姐在访问，我想她正在沙发上睡觉。
english: I'd love to ask you in, but uh, my sister's visiting and I think she's asleep on the couch.

name: train_dia55_utt3
chinese: 你是姐姐？你姐姐在沙发上睡着了？哦！我看到了。
english: You're sister? You're sister's asleep on the couch?  Ohhh! I saw

chinese: 哦，嘿，太好了，你醒了。瑞秋，这是我妹妹克里斯塔。克里斯塔，这是瑞秋。
english: Oh hey, great, you're up. Rachel, this is my sister Krista. Krista, this is Rachel.

name: train_dia55_utt5
chinese: 嗨！

chinese: 很高兴见到你。我希望你告诉我我们要有客人，我会打扮一下的！
english: Nice to meet you. I wish you'd told me we were having company, I'd fix myself up!

name: train_dia55_utt7
chinese: 就像它会有帮助一样。
english: Like it would help.

name: train_dia55_utt8
chinese: 你真的很糟糕！
english: You are so bad!

name: train_dia55_utt9
chinese: 你是！
english: You are!

name: train_dia55_utt10
chinese: 你是！
english: You are!

name: train_dia55_utt11
chinese: 你是！
english: You are!

name: train_dia55_utt12
chinese: 你是！
english: You are!

name: train_dia55_utt13
chinese: 你是！
english: You are!

name: train_dia55_utt14
chinese: 你是！
english: You are!

name: train_dia55_utt15
chinese: 你死定了！我要抓住你。
english: You are so dead! I'm gonna get you.

name: train_dia55_utt16
chinese: 嗯，很高兴见到你。
english: Uh, it was very nice meeting you.

name: train_dia56_utt0
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，那是维多利亚的秘密模特。某个...某个叫Goodacre的人。
english: Oh my God, it's that Victoria's Secret model. Something... something Goodacre.

name: train_dia56_utt1
chinese: 嗨妈妈，我是吉尔。
english: Hi Mom, it's Jill.

name: train_dia56_utt2
chinese: 她是对的，是吉尔。吉尔·古德克雷尔。哦天啊。我被困在一个自动取款机门厅里，和吉尔·古德克雷尔在一起！
english: She's right, it's Jill. Jill Goodacre. Oh my God. I am trapped in an ATM vestibule with Jill Goodacre!

name: train_dia56_utt3
chinese: 是的，我很好。我只是被困在银行的自动取款机门厅里。
english: Yeah, I'm fine. I'm just stuck at the bank, in an ATM vestibule.

name: train_dia56_utt4
chinese: 吉尔说 vestibule... 我选择 vestibule。
english: Jill says vestibule... I'm going with vestibule.

name: train_dia56_utt5
chinese: 我很好。不，我不是一个人...我不知道，有个男人。
english: I'm fine. No, I'm not alone... I don't know, some guy.

chinese: 哦！有个家伙。有个家伙。“嘿，吉尔，我昨晚看到你和一个家伙在一起。是的，他是
english: Oh! Some guy. Some guy. 'Hey Jill, I saw you with some guy last night. Yes, he was

chinese: 你现在有没有在和任何人约会？
english: Are you seeing anybody right now?

english: Og-ee-op, I'm not asking for me, I'm I mean No, I'm-I'm not gay, I'm not asking you out.

name: train_dia57_utt3
chinese: 我不是-我不是-我不是同性恋！
english: I'm not-I'm not-I'm not gay!

name: train_dia58_utt0
chinese: 个人购物？那是什么？就像你和自命不凡的富人一起四处逛，告诉他们该买什么？
english: Personal shopping? What is that? Like where you walk around with snooty rich people and tell them what to buy?

name: train_dia58_utt1
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Uh-huh.

name: train_dia58_utt2
chinese: 那听起来很棒！
english: That sounds great!

name: train_dia58_utt3
chinese: 嘿！

name: train_dia58_utt4
chinese: 嗯，打扰一下，我们换了公寓。你不能再吃我们的食物了，那个免费的时代已经结束了。
english: Umm, excuse me, we switched apartments. You can't eat are food anymore, that-that gravy train had ended.

name: train_dia58_utt5
chinese: 有肉汁吗？
english: There's gravy?

name: train_dia58_utt6

english: If you have the big apartment you have to deal with people coming over all the time.

english: That fridge has got to be stocked, okay, that's your department now.

english: So, in conclusion, the lines all go up , so I'm happy.

english: Great job team!

name: train_dia59_utt2

english: Tomorrow at 8:30.

name: train_dia59_utt3
chinese: 菲尔！
english: Phil!

name: train_dia59_utt4
chinese: 干得好。
english: Nice job.

name: train_dia59_utt5
chinese: 史蒂文斯！

name: train_dia59_utt6
chinese: 太棒了！

chinese: 嘭！

name: train_dia61_utt0

name: train_dia61_utt1

chinese: 嗯，你呢？

english: You're not feeling left out or anything are ya?

name: train_dia61_utt5
chinese: 不，不，一点也不，那太荒谬了。

name: train_dia61_utt6
chinese: 每个人都有一个，你也想要一个。不是吗？
english: Everybody else got one, and you want one too. Don't you?

name: train_dia61_utt7
chinese: 是的，是的，是的，是的，是的，是的！

name: train_dia61_utt8
chinese: 现在赶紧离开这里，你！

chinese: 嘿，鲍勃。

name: train_dia62_utt1
chinese: 嘿！我的朋友托比今天怎么样？
english: Hey! How's my pal Toby doing today?

english: Ahh, to be 13 again.

name: train_dia200_utt0
chinese: 嘿！那么，他对这些票感到兴奋吗？
english: Hey! So uh, was he excited about the tickets?

name: train_dia200_utt1
chinese: 不！他放我们鸽子了！
english: No! He blew us off!

name: train_dia200_utt2
chinese: 什么？！
english: What?!

name: train_dia200_utt3
chinese: 我知道！
english: I know!

name: train_dia200_utt4
chinese: 我简直不敢相信。我可以告诉你一件事吗？我现在有点生他的气。
english: I can't believe it.  Can I tell you something? I'm a little mad at him now.

name: train_dia200_utt5
chinese: 我可以告诉你一件事吗？我也是。
english: Can I tell you something? Me too.

name: train_dia200_utt6
chinese: 你知道吗？他不想和我们谈论生气的事情，也许我们也不和他谈话。
english: Y'know what? He didn't want to talk to us about being angry, well maybe we don't talk to him

name: train_dia200_utt7
chinese: 哦！冻结他出局。
english: Ooooh! Freeze him out.

name: train_dia200_utt8
chinese: 没错！
english: That's right!

name: train_dia200_utt9
chinese: 我喜欢它！
english: I like it!

name: train_dia201_utt0
chinese: 门把手？
english: Doorknob?

name: train_dia201_utt1
chinese: 是的，它有点让人喜欢上了。实际上，我想和你谈谈春假的事情。
english: Yeah, it kinda grows on you.  Actually, I wanted to finish talking to you about uh, spring vacation.

name: train_dia201_utt2
chinese: 哦，太好了。
english: Oh good.

name: train_dia201_utt3
chinese: 看，我和你在一起的时候很开心，我只是不想我们发展得太快或给彼此太多压力。
english: Look, I  Look, I'm having a great time with you and I just don't want us to move to fast or put to much pressure on us.

name: train_dia201_utt4
chinese: 所以，很抱歉，我只是觉得我们还不应该一起离开。
english: So, I'm sorry I just don't think we should go away together yet.

name: train_dia201_utt5
chinese: 这太快了。
english: It's-it's too soon.

name: train_dia201_utt6
chinese: 罗斯，我觉得你误解了我的意思。我只是想告诉你我要去佛罗里达待几个星期。
english: Ross, I think you misunderstood what I was saying. I just wanted to tell you that I'm going to Florida for a couple weeks.

name: train_dia201_utt7
chinese: 不，我认为你误解了什么。
english: No. I think you misunderstood what

name: train_dia201_utt8
chinese: 你太可爱了。
english: You are so adorable.

name: train_dia201_utt9
chinese: 那个！让我们谈谈那个。
english: That! Let's talk about that.

name: train_dia202_utt0
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia202_utt1
chinese: 你感觉如何？
english: How do you feel?

name: train_dia202_utt2
chinese: 嗯，我们只能说Krog将在十二到十四个小时内再次完全准备好摧毁宇宙。
english: Well, let's just say that Krog will be fully equipped to destroy the universe again in twelve to fourteen hours.

name: train_dia202_utt3
chinese: 好的，所以我
english: Okay, so I

name: train_dia202_utt4
chinese: 并保护他们免受龙卷风的伤害？
english: And protected them from a tornado?

name: train_dia202_utt5
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh my God.

name: train_dia202_utt6
chinese: 我知道，宝宝们正在睡觉。
english: I know, the babies are asleep.

name: train_dia202_utt7
chinese: 菲比，发生了什么事情？！
english: Phoebe, what, what happened here?!

name: train_dia202_utt8
chinese: 我做到了！我独自照顾了这些婴儿！
english: I did it! I took care of the babies all by myself!

name: train_dia202_utt9
chinese: 但是我的公寓！
english: But my apartment!

name: train_dia202_utt12
chinese: 并不重要的是，菲比独自照顾了这些婴儿。
english: Is not as important as the fact that Phoebe took care of the babies all by herself.

name: train_dia202_utt13
chinese: 你是对的，你是对的，我不应该惊慌失措。
english: You're right, you're right I shouldn't freak out.

name: train_dia202_utt14
chinese: 因为这就是当你和我有了孩子会发生的事情！
english: Cause this is what will happen when you and I have babies!

name: train_dia202_utt15
chinese: 那会是什么时候？
english: When will that be?

name: train_dia202_utt16
chinese: 菲比，你能看看这个混乱吗！！！
english: Phoebe, would you take a look at this mess!!!!

name: train_dia203_utt0
chinese: 嘿，罗斯！宝宝在踢动！
english: Hey Ross! The baby's kicking!

name: train_dia203_utt1
chinese: 什么？这是什么意思？
english: What?! It is?!

name: train_dia203_utt2
chinese: 现在它不起作用。虽然我们很想看到你再次这样做。
english: It's not kicking right now. Although we would love to see you do  that again.

name: train_dia203_utt3
chinese: 嘿，什么时候发生的？发生了什么事？
english: Hey, when-when was it kicking? What happened?

name: train_dia203_utt4
chinese: 昨晚！我只是感觉到了，然后我走进了乔伊的房间，他正在睡觉。
english: Last night! I just felt it and I went into Joey's room and he was sleeping

name: train_dia203_utt5
chinese: 一场没有梦的睡眠。
english: A dreamless sleep.

name: train_dia204_utt0
chinese: 那么，快点，你们告诉我所有的八卦！
english: So c'mon, you guys, tell me all the dirt!

name: train_dia204_utt1
chinese: 好吧，最大的新闻还是你在婚礼上抛弃了巴里！
english: Well, the biggest news is still you dumping Barry at the altar!

name: train_dia204_utt2
chinese: 好的。让我们现实地谈一下。
english: Alright. Let's talk reality for a second.

name: train_dia204_utt3
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: train_dia204_utt4
chinese: 你什么时候回家？
english: When are you coming home?

name: train_dia204_utt5
chinese: 什么？伙计们，我不是。
english: What? Guys, I'm not.

name: train_dia204_utt6
chinese: 来吧，这就是我们。
english: C'mon, this is us.

name: train_dia204_utt7
chinese: 我不是！这是我现在正在做的事情。我有这份工作-
english: I'm not! This is what I'm doing now. I've got this job-

name: train_dia204_utt8
chinese: 服务员工作吗？
english: Waitressing?

name: train_dia204_utt9
chinese: 好的，我不只是个女服务员。
english: Okay, I'm not just waitressing.

name: train_dia204_utt10
chinese: 我是..
english: I'm..

name: train_dia204_utt11
english: I, um...

name: train_dia204_utt12
chinese: 我在特价板上写下特价菜，然后，嗯...然后我，嗯...
english: I write the specials on the specials board, and, uh... and I, uh...

name: train_dia204_utt13
chinese: 我把花瓶里的枯萎花拿出来...哦，还有，嗯，有时候阿特尔会让我把小巧克力块放在饼干上。
english: I take the uh dead flowers out of the vase... Oh, and, um, sometimes Artelle lets me put the little chocolate blobbies on the cookies.

name: train_dia205_utt0
chinese: 我们大约在午夜下班，为什么不在那时候来接你呢？
english: We get off around midnight, why don't we pick you up then?

name: train_dia205_utt1
chinese: 那么，嗯，你会带来卡车吗？
english: So, um, will you bring the truck?

name: train_dia205_utt2
chinese: 我甚至会让你敲门铃。
english: I'll even let you ring the bell.

name: train_dia205_utt3
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh, my god.

name: train_dia205_utt4
chinese: 看，你看，净化工作起作用了！
english: See, there you go, the cleansing works!

name: train_dia205_utt5
chinese: 他们是好人。
english: They're nice guys.

name: train_dia205_utt6
chinese: 哦，他们是消防员。
english: Oh, they're firemen guys.

name: train_dia206_utt0
chinese: 你的儿子。
english: Your son.

name: train_dia206_utt1
chinese: 不不不。我没有一个叫Jordie的儿子。我们都同意，我儿子的名字是Jamie。
english: No-no-no. I don't have a son named Jordie. We all agreed, my son's name is Jamie.

name: train_dia206_utt2
chinese: 嗯，杰米是苏珊的第一个女朋友的名字，所以我们回到了乔迪。
english: Well, Jamie was the name of Susan's first girlfriend, so we went back to Jordie.

name: train_dia206_utt3
chinese: 什么？哇，哇哇哇哇，你是什么意思？
english: What? Whoa, whoa whoa whoa, what do you mean,

name: train_dia206_utt4
chinese: 哎呀，哎呀，哎呀，哎呀，腿抽筋，腿抽筋，腿抽筋。
english: Ow, ow, ow, ow, leg cramp, leg cramp, leg cramp.

name: train_dia206_utt5
chinese: 我明白了。
english: I got it.

name: train_dia206_utt6
chinese: 我明白了。
english: I got it.

name: train_dia206_utt7
chinese: 我明白了！嘿，你可以和她一起睡觉，我却得经受痛经的折磨。
english: I got it! Hey, you get to sleep with her, I get the cramps.

name: train_dia206_utt8
chinese: 不，你不是。
english: No, you don't.

name: train_dia206_utt9
chinese: 好的，就这样吧。我要你们两个都离开。
english: All right, that's it. I want both of you out.

name: train_dia206_utt10
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: train_dia206_utt11
chinese: 他开始了！
english: He started it!

name: train_dia206_utt12
chinese: 不，是你先开始的。
english: No, you started it.

name: train_dia206_utt13
chinese: 我不在乎。我正在试图让一个人从我的身体里出来，而你并没有让这变得更容易。
english: I don't care. I am trying to get a person out of my body here, and you're not making it any easier.

name: train_dia206_utt14
chinese: 现在走！
english: Now go!

name: train_dia206_utt15
chinese: 非常感谢。
english: Thanks a lot.

name: train_dia206_utt16
chinese: 看看你做了什么。
english: See what you did.

name: train_dia206_utt17
chinese: 是的，请听着...
english: Yeah, listen...

name: train_dia206_utt18
chinese: 外出
english: Out

name: train_dia207_utt0
chinese: 哦，而且我也会说一点法语。Voulez-vous coucher avec moi ce soir？为什么？我说了什么？
english: Oh, and I can also speak a little French. Voulez-vous coucher avec moi ce soir?  Why? What did I say?

name: train_dia207_utt1
chinese: 嗯，你刚刚问我今晚是否想和你上床。
english: Well, you just asked if I wanted to go to bed with you tonight.

name: train_dia207_utt2
chinese: 哦，我的天啊！难怪我在莫里斯咖啡店能得到如此好的服务。
english: Oh my God! No wonder I get such great service at Cafe Maurice.

name: train_dia207_utt3
chinese: 敲门声，敲门声，敲门声，敲门声，嗨。
english: Knock, knock, knock, knock, hi.

name: train_dia207_utt4
chinese: 嗯，请你告诉谢尔盖，我对Boutros Boutros Gali在《纽约时报》上说的话很着迷。
english: Um, could you please tell Sergei that um, I was fascinated by what Boutros Boutros Gali said in the New York Times.

name: train_dia207_utt5
chinese: 你没有说过布特罗斯·布特罗斯·加利。
english: You didn't say Boutros Boutros Gali.

name: train_dia207_utt6
chinese: 布特罗斯·布特罗斯·加利。
english: Boutros Boutros Gali.

name: train_dia207_utt7
chinese: 他说他也是。
english: He says he was too.

name: train_dia207_utt8
chinese: 有趣的。
english: Interesting.

name: train_dia207_utt9
chinese: 所以我在想...
english: So I was wondering....

name: train_dia207_utt10
chinese: 好的，在你再次开始说话之前，嗯，你能否也告诉谢尔盖，我非常喜欢他的西装。
english: Okay, ah, before you get all talky again, umm, could you also please tell Sergei that I really like his suit.

name: train_dia207_utt11
chinese: 嗯，他说，非常感谢，他认为你今晚看起来非常漂亮，你的头发像太阳一样金黄。
english: Eh, he said, thank you very much, he thinks you look very pretty tonight, your hair, golden like the sun.

name: train_dia207_utt12
chinese: 所以你是个厨师吗？
english: So you're a chef?

name: train_dia207_utt13
chinese: 我也在考虑开一家自己的餐厅。
english: I'm also thinking about opening up my own restaurant.

name: train_dia207_utt14
chinese: 哦，真的吗。
english: Oh, really.

name: train_dia207_utt15
chinese: 莫妮卡，我可以请你在菜单后面和你谈话吗？你在做什么？
english: Monica, can I talk to you behind my menu, please.  What are you doing?

name: train_dia207_utt16
chinese: 嗯，我正在进行一次对话。
english: Well, I was having a conversation.

name: train_dia207_utt17
chinese: 是的，但是米夏对你非常感兴趣，以至于谢尔盖和我都没能说上两句话。
english: Yeah but, Mischa is so interested in you, that Sergei and I haven't been able to say two words to each other.

name: train_dia207_utt18
chinese: 你想让我做什么？就在这里静静地坐着，让你们三个聊天吗？
english: What do you want me to do? Just sit here silently while you three have a conversation?

name: train_dia207_utt19
chinese: 那将会很棒。谢谢。
english: That would be great. Thank you.

name: train_dia208_utt0
chinese: 所以我们终于到达山顶，而这个笨蛋却忘记了相机！
english: so we finally get to the top of the mountain and airhead here  forgets the camera!

name: train_dia208_utt1
chinese: 哦，你知道的，有一次我也遇到了同样的事情。
english: Oh, y'know the same thing happened to me one time.

name: train_dia208_utt2
chinese: 那件事什么时候发生在你身上的？！
english: When did that happen to you?!

name: train_dia208_utt3
chinese: 你还记得我们在公园慢跑时看到那只非常漂亮的鸟，想要拍照，可我没有带相机！
english: Don't you remember when we were jogging in the park and we saw that really pretty bird and wanted to take a picture I didn't have my camera!

name: train_dia208_utt4
chinese: 哦，是的。首先，追逐Churo的家伙不是慢跑。
english: Oh yeah. First off all, chasing the Churo guy isn't jogging.

name: train_dia208_utt5
chinese: 哦，这太好了，你一定要试试。
english: Oh, this is so good  you have got to try it.

name: train_dia208_utt6
chinese: 哦，该死！我把它弄到了我的裤子上。
english: Oh, damn! I got it on my pants.

name: train_dia208_utt7
chinese: 这里，我来拿。
english: Here, I'll get it.

name: train_dia208_utt8
chinese: 我们最好把这条裤子带到楼上脱掉，否则那个污渍会固定下来。
english: We'd better take these pants off upstairs or that stain's gonna set.

name: train_dia208_utt9
chinese: 是的。我今晚约会要穿这些。
english: Yep.  I'm gonna wear these on our date tonight.

name: train_dia208_utt10
chinese: 哦，太棒了！
english: Oh, great!

name: train_dia208_utt11
chinese: 好的，再见！哦，我的天啊！！
english: Okay, bye!  Oh my God!!

name: train_dia208_utt12
chinese: 那真是难以置信的！
english: That was unbelievable!

name: train_dia208_utt14
chinese: 是的，哇，对不起，瑞秋。
english: Yeah, wow, sorry Rach.

name: train_dia208_utt15
chinese: 我不相信他们是兄弟姐妹。
english: I don't believe they're brother and sister.

name: train_dia208_utt16
chinese: 他们是兄弟姐妹！！！
english: They're brother and sister!!!

name: train_dia209_utt0
chinese: 行动！
english: Action!

name: train_dia210_utt0
chinese: 我找到了这张图片！
english: I found the picture!

name: train_dia210_utt1
chinese: 什么图片？！
english: What picture?!

name: train_dia210_utt2
chinese: 我的妻子的照片！在你的背包里！
english: The picture of my wife! In your pack!

name: train_dia210_utt3
chinese: 你查看了我的个人财物？
english: You went through my personal property?

name: train_dia210_utt4
chinese: 为什么你的包里有一张Paulette的照片？
english: Why do have a picture of Paulette in your pack?!

name: train_dia210_utt5
chinese: 因为文森特，我们曾经是情人。两年了！
english: Because Vincent, we were lovers.  For two years!

name: train_dia210_utt6
chinese: 剪切！太棒了！
english: Cut! Wonderful!

name: train_dia210_utt7
chinese: 很棒的场景，是吧？
english: Great scene yeah?

name: train_dia210_utt8
chinese: 哦，你太棒了！而且，在那最后的演讲中？你把我弄湿了。
english: Oh you're awesome! And, in that last speech? You soaked me.

name: train_dia210_utt9
chinese: 这是明天的通话表。
english: Here's your call sheet for tomorrow.

name: train_dia210_utt10
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: train_dia211_utt0
chinese: 所以，钱德勒，当你告诉你的父母你订婚了，他们一定很高兴。
english: So Chandler, your parents must've been thrilled when you told them you were engaged.

name: train_dia211_utt1
chinese: 哦，是的，我应该给他们打电话。
english: Oh yeah, I should probably call them.

name: train_dia211_utt2
chinese: 我记得当我们第一次订婚的时候。
english: I remember when we first got engaged.

name: train_dia211_utt3
chinese: 哦，我想我从未听过那个故事。
english: Oh, I don't think I ever heard that story.

name: train_dia211_utt5
chinese: 嗯，我让朱迪怀孕了。我还不知道那是怎么发生的。
english: Well, I'd gotten Judy pregnant. I still don't know how that happened.

name: train_dia211_utt6
chinese: 你不知道那是怎么发生的吗？！你的狗把我的隔膜当成咬咬玩具了！
english: You don't know how that happened?! Your dog thought my diaphragm was a chew toy!

name: train_dia211_utt7
chinese: 多么甜蜜的故事。
english: What a sweet story.

name: train_dia211_utt8
chinese: 好吧，至少你不是在你五年级的万圣节派对上第一次听到这个。
english: Well, at least you're not hearing it for the first time at your fifth grade Halloween party.

name: train_dia211_utt9
chinese: 什么？！他们想要一个恐怖故事！
english: What?! They wanted a scary story!

name: train_dia211_utt10
chinese: 无论如何，我们对我们的婚礼计划感到非常兴奋，我猜很快我们将从莫妮卡婚礼基金中提取一大笔钱。
english: Anyway, we're really excited about our wedding plans, and well I guess pretty soon we'll be making a big withdrawal from the Monica wedding fund.

name: train_dia211_utt11
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia211_utt12
chinese: 你告诉她，杰克，我做不到。
english: You tell her Jack, I can't do it.

name: train_dia211_utt13
chinese: 发生了什么事？你还有莫妮卡的婚礼基金，对吗？
english: What happened? You still have the Monica wedding fund don't you?

name: train_dia211_utt14
chinese: 我们有它。只是现在，我们称之为海滩别墅。
english: We have it. Only now, we call it the beach house.

name: train_dia212_utt0
chinese: 在将蜡和亚麻布条涂抹到第一条腿上之后，
english: After applying the Waxine and linen strips to leg number one,

name: train_dia212_utt1
chinese: 那样做了！
english: Did that!

name: train_dia212_utt2
chinese: 用手轻轻抓住亚麻布条之一的易抓标签，然后以一种快速、无痛的动作将其拉下。
english: Grasp one of the linen strips by its easy grab tab' and pull it off in one quick pain free motion.

name: train_dia212_utt3
chinese: 好的。哎呀！！！哎呀-哎呀！
english: Okay.  Ow!!!!! Ow-oh-oh!

name: train_dia212_utt4
chinese: 这难道不是无痛的吗？
english: Was it not pain-free?

name: train_dia212_utt5
chinese: 不，那真的很痛苦。哦天啊，他们应该把它叫做“痛苦杂志”，现在还加了一点蜡。
english: No. It was painful. Oh my God , they should call it Pain-zine, now with a little wax.

name: train_dia212_utt6
chinese: 嗯，嗯，广告中穿着缎子睡衣的女孩们似乎不认为这是件坏事。
english: Huh, well, the girls in the satin nighties on the commercial don't seem to think it's that bad.

name: train_dia212_utt7
chinese: 这是因为他们的神经可能已经因为太愚蠢而麻木了。
english: That's because their nerves are probably deadened from being so stupid.

name: train_dia212_utt8
chinese: 但是嘿，你知道的，如果你不相信我，请随意。

chinese: 是的，当我们在观众席时，他不和我们说话，但他会挥手。

name: train_dia219_utt0

english: Wow! She is pretty, huh?

name: train_dia344_utt15
chinese: 告诉我关于它的事情，嗯？哦不不不，我不和她在一起，她只是莫妮卡！呸！
english: Tell me about it, huh?  Oh no-no-no, I'm not with her, she's just Monica!  Ewwuck!

name: train_dia345_utt0
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia345_utt1
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia345_utt2
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，我很抱歉，你是对的，这感觉真棒！
english: Oh honey, I'm so sorry, you were right, this feels great!

name: train_dia345_utt3
chinese: 看见了吗？你不在乎别人盯着你看，因为只是一瞬间，然后你就走了！
english: See? And you don't care if people are staring, it's just for a second cause then you're gone!

name: train_dia345_utt4
chinese: 走了！我的意思是太神奇了，菲比。我感觉自由而优雅。嘿！小心马！对不起！
english: Gone! I mean its amazing Pheebs. I feel so free and so graceful.  Hey! Look out for the horse! Sorry!

name: train_dia346_utt0
chinese: 噢，拜托，伙计们，我又不是搬到了欧洲！我只是搬到了隔壁而已！而且
english: Oh come on guys, it's not like I moved to Europe! I just moved across the hall! And

name: train_dia346_utt1
chinese: 啊！你还没穿好衣服吗？
english: Ahh! Aren't you dressed yet?

name: train_dia346_utt2
chinese: 我又裸体了吗？！
english: Am I naked again?!

name: train_dia346_utt3
chinese: 我们应该在15分钟内见我的父母。
english: We're supposed to meet my parents in 15 minutes.

name: train_dia346_utt4
chinese: 是的，好吧，我刚刚和那些人聊天。你看看他们，我的意思是，如果他们来访问，可以吗？
english: Yeah okay, I was just talking to the guys. Just look at them I mean, is it okay if they come visit?

name: train_dia346_utt5
chinese: 什么？！我的过敏反应怎么办？！
english: Wh?! What about my allergies?!

name: train_dia346_utt6
chinese: 哦对了，你的过敏反应。她全都是，她讨厌你。
english: Oh right, your allergies.  All her, she hates you.

name: train_dia347_utt0
chinese: 糟糕！我们的苏打水用完了。
english: Shoot! We're out of soda.

name: train_dia347_utt1
chinese: 哦，我会出去给你买一些。
english: Oh, I'll go out and get you some.

name: train_dia347_utt2
chinese: 真的吗？！
english: Really?!

name: train_dia347_utt3
chinese: 不，因为我不是你的男朋友。嘿，菲比，怎么样了？
english: Nope! Because I'm not your boyfriend.  Hey Pheebs, how did it go?

name: train_dia347_utt4
chinese: 嗯，嗯，我妈妈的朋友菲比实际上是我的亲生妈妈。
english: Well, umm, my Mom's friend, Phoebe, is actually my birth Mom.

name: train_dia347_utt5
chinese: 我发现了一片干涸的海滩。
english: I found a dried up seashores.

name: train_dia347_utt6
chinese: 亲爱的，你在说什么？
english: Sweety, what are you talking about?

name: train_dia347_utt7
chinese: 哦，我的新妈妈，是一个又胖又大的抛弃者！
english: Oh, my new Mom, who-who's a big, fat abandoner!

name: train_dia347_utt8
chinese: 哇，等等，菲比，等一下！你不想在这里待下来谈谈吗？
english: Whoa, wait, Pheebs, wait a second! Don't you wanna stay here and talk about it?

name: train_dia347_utt9
chinese: 不，我只是想要一个人，我需要独处。
english: No. I'm just, I wanna, I need to be alone.

name: train_dia347_utt10
chinese: 莫妮卡！
english: Monica!

name: train_dia347_utt11
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: train_dia348_utt0
chinese: 打开它！打开它！打开它！
english: Open it! Open it! Open it!

name: train_dia348_utt1
chinese: 是的，宝贝！
english: Yeah baby!

name: train_dia348_utt2
chinese: 那么我们从未听说过你的婚礼！
english: So we never got to hear about your wedding!

name: train_dia348_utt4
chinese: 不，不，只有我们的父母和1或2个朋友。这是一个小型婚礼。
english: No, no, it was just our parents and 1 or 2 friends. It was a small wedding.

name: train_dia349_utt0
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia349_utt1
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia349_utt2
chinese: 嗨！
english: Hi!

name: train_dia349_utt3
chinese: 那么，你们想在接下来的几周里有时间来餐厅吃晚饭吗？
english: So, do you guys wanna come and eat dinner at the restaurant    sometime in the next few weeks?

name: train_dia349_utt4
chinese: 当然！
english: Sure!

name: train_dia349_utt5
chinese: 我很愿意！
english: I'd love to!

name: train_dia349_utt6
chinese: 好的，你
english: Well you

name: train_dia349_utt7
chinese: 嗯，我不能给你按摩，因为我的执照又被吊销了！
english: Well, I can't give you a massage, because my licence has been    revoked again!

name: train_dia349_utt8
chinese: 菲比，发生了什么事？
english: Phoebe, what happened?

name: train_dia349_utt9
chinese: 嗯，这是个意外...你知道，有很多油，有时候手就会滑！
english: Well, it was an accident...You know, it's a lot of oil and sometimes    the hand just slips!

name: train_dia349_utt10
chinese: 我有一个惊喜给你！收拾好行李！
english: Have I got a surprise for you? Pack your bags!

name: train_dia349_utt11
chinese: 哦不！你们不应该在7年内离婚！
english: Oh no!You guys aren't supposed to get divorced for 7 years!

name: train_dia350_utt0
chinese: 嗯，这很好。
english: Umm, this is nice.

name: train_dia350_utt1
chinese: 我知道，是吧？
english: I know, it is isn't it?

name: train_dia350_utt2
chinese: 不，我是认真的，这感觉真的很好。这是百分之百的棉吗？
english: No, I mean it, this feels really good. Is it a hundred percent cotton?

name: train_dia350_utt3
chinese: 是的！而且我还打折买到了。
english: Yeah! And I got it on sale, too.

name: train_dia350_utt4
chinese: 无论如何，我应该走了，其中一名救生员正准备拆除一个核装置。
english: Anyway, I should go, one of the lifeguards was just about to dismantle a nuclear device.

name: train_dia350_utt5
chinese: 好的，如果你想晚点喝一杯，我们可以。
english: Well, if you wanna get a drink later we can.

name: train_dia350_utt6
chinese: 哦，是的，听起来很棒。哦，还有，听着，它，它会是...
english: Oh yeah, that sounds great.  Oh, and listen, it's, it's gonna be....

name: train_dia350_utt7
chinese: 我知道。谢谢。
english: I know. Thanks.

name: train_dia351_utt0
chinese: 那又怎样？拜托！解释一下吧，盖勒！首先，你让我的瑞秋怀孕了！
english: So? Come on! Explain yourself Geller! First you get my Rachel pregnant!

name: train_dia351_utt1
chinese: 你让Rachel怀孕了？！
english: You got Rachel pregnant?!

name: train_dia351_utt2
chinese: 谁做的？
english: Who did?!

name: train_dia351_utt3
chinese: 你做了！
english: You did!

name: train_dia351_utt4
chinese: 是的。是的，是的，我做了。但是，但是那只是一夜的事。它毫无意义。
english: Yes. Yes, yes I did.  But-but it was, it was just a one night thing. It meant nothing.

name: train_dia351_utt5
chinese: 哦？真的吗？这就是你对我女儿的看法？什么都没有？
english: Oh? Really? That's what my daughter means to you? Nothing?

name: train_dia351_utt6
chinese: 不！不先生，嗯，她对我来说很重要。我的意思是，我在乎我-我爱瑞秋。
english: No! No sir umm, she means a lot to me. I mean, I care I-I love Rachel.

name: train_dia351_utt7
chinese: 什么？！
english: What?!

name: train_dia351_utt8
chinese: 哦，但不是那样。我的意思是，我的意思是我不爱她。我像朋友一样爱她。
english: Oh but not that way. I meanI mean I'm not in love with her. I love her like a, like a friend.

name: train_dia351_utt9
chinese: 哦，真的吗？这就是你对待朋友的方式吗？你让她陷入麻烦，然后又拒绝娶她？
english: Oh really? That's how treat a friend? You get her in trouble and then refuse to marry her?

name: train_dia351_utt10
chinese: 嘿！我提出要娶她！
english: Hey! I offered to marry her!

name: train_dia351_utt11
chinese: 抱歉，无法将"Wh"翻译为中文，因为它不是一个有效的词汇或短语。
english: Wh

name: train_dia351_utt12
chinese: 但是我不想要。
english: But I didn't want to.

name: train_dia351_utt13
chinese: 好吧，为什么不呢？这样你就可以和这个流浪汉一起度过时间了吗？
english: Well why not? So you can spend your time with this tramp?!

name: train_dia351_utt14
chinese: 跳蚤？！
english: Tramp?!

name: train_dia351_utt15
chinese: 对不起。格林博士，莫娜。莫娜，格林博士。
english: I'm sorry. Dr. Green, Mona. Mona, Dr. Green.

name: train_dia352_utt0
chinese: 是的，弗兰。
english: Yes, Fran.

name: train_dia352_utt1
chinese: 我知道现在是什么时间，但我正在看着WENUS，我不开心！...
english: I know what time it is, but I'm looking at the WENUS and I'm not happy!...

name: train_dia352_utt2
chinese: 哦，真的，真的，真的吗？
english: Oh, really, really, really?

name: train_dia352_utt3
chinese: 好的，让我告诉你一件事...你会关心它的，因为我关心它！
english: Well, let me tell you something... you will care about it, because I care about it!

name: train_dia352_utt4
chinese: 你明白了吗？
english: You got it?

name: train_dia352_utt5
chinese: 好的！
english: Good!

name: train_dia352_utt6
chinese: 哇哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦....
english: Whooooaaaa....

name: train_dia353_utt0
chinese: 毕加索男士？毕加索男士？毕加索男士？
english: Bijan for men?  Bijan for men?  Bijan for men?

name: train_dia353_utt1
chinese: 嘿，乔伊。你听说新来的人了吗？
english: Hey, Joey. So did you hear about the new guy?

name: train_dia354_utt0
chinese: 我本可以拥有鸟。
english: I could have birds.

name: train_dia354_utt1
chinese: 好的，赫克尔斯先生，我们会尽量保持安静。
english: Okay, Mr. Heckles, we'll try to keep it down.

name: train_dia354_utt2
chinese: 谢谢。我要回去参加我的晚宴派对。
english: Thank you. I'm going to rejoin my dinner party.

name: train_dia354_utt3
chinese: 好的，再见。
english: All right, bye-bye.

name: train_dia354_utt4
chinese: 好的，珍妮丝。珍妮丝。你得给我珍妮丝。那不是挑剔的问题。
english: Okay, Janice. Janice. You gotta give me Janice. That wasn't about being picky.

name: train_dia354_utt5
chinese: 我们会给你珍妮丝。
english: We'll give you Janice.

name: train_dia354_utt6
chinese: 我还是想念珍妮丝。“你好，钱德勒·宾。”
english: I miss Janice though.  "Hello, Chandler Bing."

name: train_dia354_utt7
chinese: "哦，我的，天啊。"
english: "Oh, my, god."

name: train_dia354_utt8
chinese: 哦，钱德勒，现在，现在，就是这样。快一点！
english: "Oh, Chandler, now, now, that's it. There, faster!"

name: train_dia354_utt9
chinese: 停止用扫帚，我们不在制造噪音。
english: Stop with the broom, we're not making noise.

name: train_dia354_utt10
chinese: 我们赢了。我们赢了！
english: We won. We won!

name: train_dia354_utt11
chinese: 先生。赫克尔斯。
english: Mr. Heckles.

name: train_dia354_utt12
chinese: 这是怎么发生的？
english: How did this happen?

name: train_dia354_utt13
chinese: 他一定在扫地。他们发现他手里拿着一把扫帚。
english: He musta been sweeping. They found a broom in his hand.

name: train_dia354_utt14
chinese: 那太可怕了。
english: That's terrible.

name: train_dia354_utt15
chinese: 我知道。昨天我在扫地。可能是我。
english: I know. I was sweeping yesterday. It coulda been me.

name: train_dia354_utt16
chinese: 当然，你本来可以的。你永远不知道。
english: Sure, you coulda. You never know.

name: train_dia354_utt17
chinese: 你永远不知道。
english: You never know.

name: train_dia355_utt0
chinese: 哦，对不起。
english: Oh, I'm sorry.

name: train_dia355_utt1
chinese: 钱德勒在哪里？
english: Where's Chandler?

name: train_dia355_utt2
chinese: 哦，他需要一些时间来悲伤。
english: Oh, he needed some time to grieve.

name: train_dia355_utt3
chinese: 我自由了！我自由了！
english: I'm free! I'm free!

name: train_dia355_utt4
chinese: 那应该就可以了。
english: That oughta do it.

name: train_dia356_utt0
chinese: 嘿，看着我。我在制作果酱，从早上4点开始一直在做。
english: Hey, look at me. I'm making jam, been at it since 4 o'clock this morning.

name: train_dia356_utt1
chinese: 你在凌晨四点钟哪里买到水果的？
english: Where'd you get fruit at four in the morning?

name: train_dia356_utt2
chinese: 去了码头。打赌你不知道你可以批发买到它。
english: Went down to the docks. Bet ya didn't know you could get it wholesale.

name: train_dia356_utt3
chinese: 我不知道有码头。
english: I didn't know there were docks.

name: train_dia356_utt4
chinese: 嘿。
english: Hey.

name: train_dia356_utt5
chinese: 嘿。
english: Hey.

name: train_dia356_utt6
chinese: 哎呀，它坏了吗？
english: Aww, is it broken?

name: train_dia356_utt7
chinese: 不，我得戴这个东西几个星期。
english: No, I gotta wear this thing for a couple weeks.

name: train_dia356_utt8
chinese: 你告诉医生你是在床上跳来跳去做的吗？
english: Did you tell the doctor you did it jumping up and down on your bed?

name: train_dia356_utt9
chinese: 不。我已经准备好一个故事，但是Chandler出卖了我。
english: Nooo. I had a story all worked out but then Chandler sold me out.

name: train_dia356_utt10
chinese: 嗯，对不起乔。我没想到医生会相信它只是从插座里掉出来。
english: Well, I'm sorry Joe. I didn't think the doctor was gonna buy that it just *fell* out of the socket.

name: train_dia356_utt11
chinese: 这是什么？水果吗？
english: What is this? Fruit?

name: train_dia356_utt12
chinese: 莫妮卡正在制作果酱。
english: Monica's making jam.

name: train_dia356_utt13
chinese: 哇，果酱！我喜欢果酱！嘿，为什么我们家从来没有果酱呢？
english: Whoa, jam! I love jam!  Hey, how come we never have jam at our place?

name: train_dia356_utt14
chinese: 因为孩子们需要新鞋。
english: Because the kids need new shoes.

name: train_dia356_utt15
chinese: 我要进入商界。
english: I'm going into business people.

name: train_dia356_utt16
chinese: 我受够了为了Richard而感到沮丧。
english: I'm sick and tired of being depressed about Richard.

name: train_dia356_utt17
chinese: 我需要一个计划，一个能让我忘记我的男人的计划。
english: I needed a plan, a plan to get over my man.

name: train_dia356_utt18
chinese: 什么是男人的相反之处？
english: What's the opposite of man?

name: train_dia356_utt19
chinese: 果酱。
english: Jam.

name: train_dia356_utt20
chinese: 哦，乔伊不要！
english: Oh Joey don't!

name: train_dia356_utt21
chinese: 太热了。
english: It's way to hot.

name: train_dia356_utt22
chinese: 这只是我的一批。
english: This will just be my batch.

name: train_dia357_utt1
chinese: 为什么？你认为他还对我们生气吗？
english: Why? Do you think he's still mad at us?

name: train_dia357_utt2
chinese: 嗯，你今天早上打电话向他借他的护目镜，他可能生气了。
english: Well he's probably mad after you called him this morning to borrow his goggles.

name: train_dia357_utt3
chinese: 什么？我的没有着色。
english: What? Mine aren't tinted.

name: train_dia358_utt0
chinese: 给你，菲比。还有谁想要我特制的自制布朗尼？
english: Here you go Pheebs. Who else wants one of my special homemade brownies?

name: train_dia358_utt1
chinese: 我要一个。
english: I will have one.

name: train_dia358_utt2
chinese: 好的，我不会有一个。
english: Okay, I'm not gonna have one.

name: train_dia358_utt3
chinese: 不，不，只是我的牙齿。
english: No, no, it's just my tooth.

name: train_dia358_utt4
chinese: 好的，我要一个。
english: All right I'll have one.

name: train_dia358_utt5
chinese: 那么怎么了，你需要看牙医吗？我知道一个好的。
english: So what's a matter, you need a dentist? I've got a good one.

name: train_dia358_utt6
chinese: 不用了，我也有一个好的。只是，我，我看不见他。
english: No thanks, I have a good one too. I just, I, I can't see him.

name: train_dia358_utt7
chinese: 看，这就是隐形牙医的问题。
english: See that is the problem with invisible dentists.

name: train_dia358_utt8
chinese: 为什么？为什么你不能去找他？
english: Why? Why can't you go to him?

name: train_dia358_utt9
chinese: 因为，每次我去看牙医，都会有人死亡。
english: Because, every time I go to the dentist, somebody dies.

name: train_dia358_utt10
chinese: 那真是太奇怪了，因为每次我去看牙医时，我都会低头看卫生员的衬衫。
english: That is so weird, because every time I go to the dentist, I look down the hygienist's blouse.

name: train_dia358_utt11
chinese: 菲比，什么？嗯...什么？！
english: Phoebe, what? Umm...what?!

name: train_dia358_utt12
chinese: 是的，是的，首先是我的姑姑玛丽，然后是嗯，我的邮递员约翰，然后是我的，我的牛仔朋友阿尔比诺鲍勃。
english: Yeah, yeah, first there was my aunt Mary, and then there was umm, John, my mailman, and then my, my cowboy friend Albino Bob'.

name: train_dia358_utt13
chinese: 这些人都真的死了吗？
english: And all these people actually died?

name: train_dia358_utt14
chinese: 是的，当我在椅子上的时候！
english: Yes, while I was in the chair!

name: train_dia358_utt15
chinese: 这就是为什么我现在如此重视我的牙齿，你知道的，这不仅仅是口腔卫生问题，我使用牙线是为了拯救生命！
english: That's why I take such good care of my teeth now, y'know, it's not about oral hygiene, I floss to save lives!

name: train_dia358_utt16
chinese: 费比，拜托，你没有杀过任何人，这些人只是碰巧在你去看牙医的时候去世了。
english: Pheebs, come on, you didn't kill anybody, these people just happened to die when you went to the dentist.

name: train_dia358_utt17
chinese: 这只是一个巧合。
english: It's, it's, it's just ah, a coincidence.

name: train_dia358_utt18
chinese: 好吧，告诉他们吧。哦！你不能，他们已经死了。
english: Well tell that to them. Oh! You can't, their dead.

name: train_dia359_utt0
chinese: 你好？
english: Hello?

name: train_dia359_utt1
chinese: 罗斯。
english: Ross.

name: train_dia359_utt3
chinese: 那真是可怕的。当你说那些美好的话时，我对自己的行为感到非常糟糕。
english: It was dreadful. I felt terrible about how I acted when you said those wonderful things.

name: train_dia359_utt4
chinese: 不，不，没事的。嗯，我很高兴你打电话来了。
english: No, no, that-that, that's all right. Umm, I'm just glad you called.

name: train_dia359_utt5
chinese: 罗斯，嗯，有件事我必须告诉你，有，有别人了。
english: Ross umm, there's something that I've got to tell you, there's-there's someone else.

name: train_dia359_utt6
chinese: 这是否意味着在英国和美国它的意思是一样的？
english: Does that mean the same thing in England as it does in America?

name: train_dia360_utt0
chinese: 你知道吗？我将无法享受这个。
english: You know what? I'm not gonna be able to enjoy this.

name: train_dia360_utt1
chinese: 是的，我知道，今天是我的生日。我们都应该在这里。

english: Really?

name: train_dia422_utt7
chinese: 当然！只要抵制住你所有的本能，你就会很棒。
english: Absolutely! Just fight all your natural instincts and you'll be great.

name: train_dia423_utt0
chinese: 现在，妈妈，一切都很好，真的。
english: Now, Mom, everything's going fine, really.

name: train_dia423_utt1
chinese: 是的，罗斯很棒。
english: Yeah, Ross is great.

name: train_dia423_utt2
chinese: 他，嗯，他在一个完全不同的地方。
english: He's uh, he's in a whole other place.

name: train_dia423_utt3
chinese: 不，他走了。
english: No, he's gone.

name: train_dia423_utt4
chinese: 不，不，你不必飞回来，真的。
english: No no, you don't have to fly back, really.

name: train_dia423_utt5
chinese: 你是什么意思，这可能是你唯一的机会？
english: What do you mean this might be your only chance?

name: train_dia423_utt6
chinese: 你能停下来吗？
english: Would you stop?

name: train_dia423_utt7
chinese: 我只有26岁，我甚至还没有考虑过要生孩子。
english: I'm only 26, I'm not even thinking about babies yet.

name: train_dia423_utt8
chinese: 你去哪里了？
english: Where have you been?

name: train_dia423_utt9
chinese: 哦，刚刚生了一个宝宝。
english: Oh, just had a baby.

name: train_dia423_utt10
chinese: 恭喜！
english: Mazel tov!

name: train_dia424_utt0
chinese: 哦，哇！我应该走了。我，我今晚有个约会。
english: Oh, wow! I should get going. I-I got a date tonight.

name: train_dia424_utt1
chinese: 哦，是吗！和谁一起？
english: Oh yeah! With who?

name: train_dia424_utt2
chinese: 你知道我跟你说过的那个住在波基普西的女孩吗？
english: You know that girl I told you about who lives up in Poughkeepsie?

name: train_dia424_utt3
chinese: 不是她。
english: Not her.

name: train_dia424_utt4
chinese: 是的，这是我遇到的另一个人，我-我无法在他们两个之间做出决定。
english: Yeah, this is someone else I meet, and I-I can't decide between the two of them.

name: train_dia424_utt5
chinese: 你知道那个来自波基普西的人，尽管她离这里有两个小时的火车车程，但她非常漂亮，非常聪明，而且非常有趣。
english: Y'know the one from Poughkeepsie, even though she's a two hour train ride away, is really pretty, really smart, and-and a lot of fun.

name: train_dia424_utt6
chinese: 但是这个其他的女孩，嗯，她住在市区。
english: But this other girl, well, she lives right uptown.

name: train_dia424_utt7
chinese: 你知道她，嗯她，嗯她只是一样漂亮，我猜她聪明，她是。
english: Y'know she's, well she's-she's just as pretty, I guess she's smart, she's

name: train_dia424_utt8
chinese: 如果她不好玩，你为什么还想和她约会呢？
english: If she's no fun, why do you want to date her at all?

name: train_dia424_utt9
chinese: 嗯，我想给她另一次机会，你知道吗？
english: Well, I-I want to give her another chance, y'know?

name: train_dia424_utt10
chinese: 她住得如此近。
english: She lives so close.

name: train_dia424_utt11
chinese: 在约会结束时，她说了一些如果她在开玩笑的话非常有趣的事情。
english: And, at the end of the date, the other time, she-she said something that was if she was kidding was very funny.

name: train_dia424_utt12
chinese: 另一方面，如果她不是在开玩笑，她不是有趣的，她是愚蠢的，而且有点种族主义。
english: On the other hand, if she wasn't kidding, she's not fun, she's stupid, and kind of a racist.

name: train_dia424_utt14
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia424_utt15
chinese: 嘿！哦，你在餐厅工作的第一天怎么样？
english: Hey! Ooh, how was your first day working at the restaurant?

name: train_dia424_utt16
chinese: 该死！
english: Damn!

name: train_dia425_utt0
chinese: 哦，这里有一大堆。
english: Oh here's a whole bunch.

name: train_dia425_utt1
chinese: 哦，我的意思是她会在婚礼上等他，人们会窃窃私语说：“哦，那个可怜的女孩。”
english: Oh, I mean she's gonna be at the wedding waiting for him and people will be whispering, "Oh that poor girl."

name: train_dia425_utt2
chinese: 然后她将不得不回到这里，独自生活。
english: Then she'll have to come back here and live all alone.

name: train_dia425_utt3
chinese: 哦，我的天啊！
english: Oh my God!

name: train_dia425_utt4
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia425_utt5
chinese: 垃圾桶里有一个怀孕测试，结果是阳性。莫妮卡怀孕了。所以我猜她不会完全孤单。
english: There was a pregnancy test in the garbage, and it's positive. Monica's pregnant.  So I guess she won't be totally alone.

name: train_dia426_utt0
chinese: 嗨。
english: Hi.

name: train_dia426_utt1
chinese: 听着，我对那件和罗杰有关的事情感到抱歉。
english: Listen, I'm sorry about that whole thing with Roger.

name: train_dia426_utt2
chinese: 这真的不对，我想弥补给你的过失，所以嗯，我给你带来了一样我认为你会非常喜欢的东西。
english: It really wasn't right, and I, and I want to make it up to you, so umm, I brought you something that I think you'll really enjoy.

name: train_dia426_utt3
chinese: 现在，这只是一笔贷款。
english: Now, this is just a loan.

name: train_dia426_utt4
chinese: 好吗？
english: Okay?

name: train_dia426_utt5
chinese: 我要，我要让他回来。
english: I'm gonna, I'm gonna want him back.

name: train_dia426_utt6
chinese: 所以我现在要走了。
english: So  I'm gonna go now.

name: train_dia426_utt7
chinese: 对不起，我以为我能做到，但我做不到！
english: I'm sorry, I thought I could do it and I can't!

name: train_dia427_utt0
chinese: 好吧，那我为什么不和前男友出去，帮助乔伊呢？！
english: All right, well why don't I go out with an ex-boyfriend and do Joey a favor?!

name: train_dia427_utt1
chinese: 嘿，你想帮助乔伊吗，也许你可以和乔伊一起出去。
english: Hey, you wanna do Joey a favor, maybe you go out with Joey.

name: train_dia428_utt0
chinese: 好的女士们，这是我们要做的事情。
english: All right ladies, here's what we're gonna do.

name: train_dia428_utt1
chinese: 我-我想和她在一起，我喜欢她。
english: I-I wanna be with her,  I like her.

name: train_dia428_utt2
chinese: 哦，没关系！跟随你的直觉，跟随你的直觉。
english: Oh, that's fine! Go with your instincts, go with your instincts.

name: train_dia428_utt3
chinese: 等一下，现在，我再做什么来着？
english: Wait, now, what am I doing again?

name: train_dia428_utt4
chinese: 加油！请你注意，我随时都可能醒来！
english: Come on! Would you please pay attention, I could wake up at any moment!

name: train_dia428_utt5
chinese: 嗨，我是约书亚，我来接拉切尔。
english: Hi, I'm Joshua, I'm here to pick up Rachel.

name: train_dia428_utt6
chinese: 不不不，那不是约书亚。
english: No-no-no, that' not Joshua.

name: train_dia428_utt7
chinese: 你想从我这里得到什么，我从未见过那个人。
english: What do you want from me, I've never met the guy.

name: train_dia428_utt8
chinese: 所以无论如何，Rachel，很抱歉你不能留下，但是我们其他人还有事情要做。
english: So anyway, Rachel, I'm sorry you can't stay,  but the rest of us have a

name: train_dia429_utt0
chinese: 我看起来怎么样？
english: How do I look?

name: train_dia429_utt1
chinese: 哦，嗯，我...不...在乎。
english: Oh, uh, I... don't... care.

name: train_dia429_utt2
chinese: 好的，现在记住，不要交易。
english: Ok, now, remember, no trading.

name: train_dia429_utt3
chinese: 你拿到漂亮的那个，我拿到混乱的那个。
english: You get the pretty one, I get the mess.

name: train_dia429_utt4
chinese: 嗨，乔伊。嗯嗯，看看你带来了什么。非常好。
english: Hi, Joey. Well well, look what you brought. Very nice.

name: train_dia429_utt5
chinese: ...你带了什么？
english: ...And what did you bring?

name: train_dia429_utt6
chinese: 她正在检查外套。
english: She's checking the coats.

name: train_dia429_utt7
chinese: 乔伊，我要去洗掉手上的出租车味道。
english: Joey, I'm gonna go wash the cab smell off my hands.

name: train_dia429_utt8
chinese: 你能给我一杯白色的赞菲德尔红葡萄酒，还有一杯红葡萄酒给珍妮丝吗？
english: Will you get me a white Zinfandel, and a glass of red for Janice.

name: train_dia429_utt9
chinese: 你好，Janice？
english: Janice?

name: train_dia429_utt10
chinese: 哦...我的...上帝。
english: Oh.... my.... God.

name: train_dia429_utt11
chinese: 嘿，我是珍妮丝。
english: Hey, it's Janice.

name: train_dia430_utt0
chinese: 好的，好吧，我还没有完全想清楚。请不要对Rachel说任何话，好吗？
english: Well, okay so, I don't have it all worked out quite yet. Just don't say anything to Rachel, please?

name: train_dia430_utt1
chinese: 瑞秋是我最亲密的朋友之一。虽然，作为唯一一个知道这件事的人让我感到特别。好的！
english: Rachel is one of my closest friends.  Although, being the only one who knows anything about this does makes me feel special. Okay!

name: train_dia430_utt2
chinese: 好的，停下来！菲比？！
english: Okay, stop-stop! Phoebe?!

name: train_dia430_utt3
chinese: 嘿，瑞秋！
english: Hey Rach!

name: train_dia430_utt4
chinese: 那是什么？！
english: What was that?!

name: train_dia430_utt5
chinese: 对不起，搞错了。嘿，电影怎么样？
english: Sorry, mix up. Hey, how was the movie?

name: train_dia430_utt6
chinese: 我还没有看到它！
english: I haven't seen it yet!

name: train_dia430_utt7
chinese: 那么你最好快点！安吉丽卡！走！走！
english: Well then you'd better hurry! The Angelica! Go! Go!

name: train_dia430_utt8
chinese: 不
english: No

name: train_dia431_utt0
chinese: 嘿菲比！嘿菲比！
english: Pheebs! Hey Pheebs!

name: train_dia431_utt1
chinese: 嗯，好的，菲比？
english: Uh, okay, Pheebs?

name: train_dia431_utt2
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: train_dia431_utt3
chinese: 嗯，你知道前几天你说你没去伦敦，感觉有点被排除在外吗？
english: Umm, y'know how the other day you were talking about how you didn't get to go to London and how you were kinda feeling left out?

name: train_dia431_utt4
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: train_dia431_utt5
chinese: 好的，嗯，我们对此感到非常难过，所以我们决定我们应该一起去旅行一下！
english: All right, well, we felt really bad about that so we decided we should all take a little trip together!

name: train_dia431_utt6
chinese: 哦，太好了！太棒了！那么，去哪里？旅行在哪里？
english: Ohh, that's so nice! How great! Well, where? Where's the trip?!

name: train_dia431_utt7
chinese: 嗯，我们想要一起去中央公园野餐！
english: Well, we thought we would all go to a picnic , in Central Park!

name: train_dia431_utt8
chinese: 是的，我们所有人！整天都是！
english: Yeah, all of us! All day!

name: train_dia431_utt9
chinese: 那真糟糕！
english: That sucks!

name: train_dia431_utt10
chinese: 那不是一次旅行！
english: That's not a trip!

name: train_dia431_utt11
chinese: 我刚从公园来！
english: I just came from the park!

name: train_dia431_utt12
chinese: 我们在愚蠢的中央公园要庆祝什么？
english: What are we gonna high five about at the stupid Central Park?

name: train_dia431_utt13
chinese: "嗯，它就在我家附近，没错！"
english: "Well, it's right by my house, all right!"

name: train_dia431_utt14
chinese: 好的，我要回家享受我中央公园想法的胜利。
english: Well, I'm gonna go home and bask in the triumph of my Central Park idea.

name: train_dia431_utt15
chinese: 请稍等一下，基西先生！
english: Ho-ho-hold on a sec there, Mr. Kissey!

name: train_dia431_utt16
chinese: 你知道的，我一直想和你谈谈你这个新的欧洲事情，我只是想告诉你，这让我感到非常不舒服，我希望你能停下来！
english: Y'know, I've been meaning to talk to you about this whole, little, new European thing you got going on, and I just need to tell you that it makes me very uncomfortable and I just y'know stop it!

name: train_dia431_utt17
chinese: 我只是想给这个团队带来一点文化。
english: I was just trying to bring a little culture to the group.

name: train_dia431_utt18
chinese: 没问题，只是不要把它带到我的嘴里。
english: That's fine, just don't bring it in my mouth.

name: train_dia431_utt19
chinese: 让我想吐！
english: Makes me wanna puke!

name: train_dia432_utt0
chinese: 她在里面吗？
english: Is she in there?

name: train_dia433_utt0
chinese: 是的。她现在正在把她放下，那是她。
english: Yeah. She's putting her down now, that's her.

name: train_dia433_utt1
chinese: 哦，没关系。
english: Oh it's all right.

name: train_dia434_utt0
chinese: 我猜我只是对整个约会的事情感到厌倦了。
english: I'm guess I'm just done with the whole dating thing.

name: train_dia434_utt1
chinese: 这是我生活中又一件突然完全不同的事情。
english: It's one more thing in my life that's suddenly completely different.

name: train_dia434_utt2
chinese: 这很难。
english: This is hard.

name: train_dia434_utt3
chinese: 是的，我知道。
english: Yeah I know.

name: train_dia434_utt4
chinese: 另一方面，在大约七个月后，你会有一件比你曾经约会过的任何男人都更喜欢的东西。
english: On the other hand in um, in about seven months you're gonna have something that you're gonna love more than any guy you've ever gone out with.

name: train_dia434_utt5
chinese: 请等一下。
english: Just wait.

name: train_dia434_utt6
chinese: 等待，直到宝宝第一次抓住你的手指。
english: Wait until uh, wait until the first time your baby grabs your finger.

name: train_dia434_utt7
chinese: 你一点都不知道。
english: You have no idea.

name: train_dia434_utt8
chinese: 谢谢亲爱的。
english: Thanks sweetie.

name: train_dia434_utt9
chinese: 你想要，你想要去喝杯咖啡吗？
english: You wanna, you wanna grab some coffee?

name: train_dia434_utt10
chinese: 哦不，我想我要回家吃十个糖果棒。
english: Oh no, I think I'm gonna go home and eat ten candy bars.

name: train_dia434_utt11
chinese: 嘿，我以为我让你开心起来了。
english: Hey, I thought I cheered you up.

name: train_dia434_utt12
chinese: 哦，你做了，这里有二十个。
english: Oh you did, there are twenty in here.

name: train_dia434_utt13
chinese: 没错。晚安。
english: Right. Good night.

name: train_dia434_utt14
chinese: 晚安。
english: Good night.

name: train_dia435_utt0
chinese: 嗨
english: Hi

name: train_dia435_utt1
chinese: 嗨！嘿，妈妈。
english: Hi!  Hey mom.

name: train_dia435_utt2
chinese: 这是一个非常棒的派对！35年了。非常令人印象深刻，你们有什么智慧的话要分享吗？
english: This is such a great party! 35 years. Very impressive, do you guys have any pearls of wisdom?

name: train_dia435_utt3
chinese: 杰克？
english: Jack?

name: train_dia435_utt4
chinese: 为什么你要用这么尖的棍子上菜？
english: Why would you serve food on such a sharp stick?

name: train_dia435_utt5
chinese: 那是个好问题，爸爸。那是个好问题。
english: That's a good question, dad. That's a good question

name: train_dia435_utt6
chinese: 恭喜你们两个！
english: Congratulations you two!

name: train_dia435_utt7
chinese: 谢谢，我们非常兴奋。
english: Thank youwe're so excited

name: train_dia435_utt8
chinese: 还有，祝贺你的婚礼。
english: And also, congratulations on your wedding.

name: train_dia435_utt9
chinese: 什么？什么？
english: Wha What?

name: train_dia436_utt0
chinese: 看这个小丑！
english: Look at this clown!

name: train_dia436_utt1
chinese: 只是因为他有一艘更大的船，他就认为自己可以占据整条河。
english: Just because he's got a bigger boat he thinks he can take up the whole river.

name: train_dia436_utt2
chinese: 滚开，蠢驴！
english: Get out of the way jackass!

name: train_dia436_utt3
chinese: 谁会给他们的船起名为“海岸警卫队”呢？
english: Who names their boat Coast Guard anyway?

name: train_dia436_utt4
chinese: 那个
english: That

name: train_dia436_utt5
chinese: 他们在这里做什么？海岸在那边。
english: What are they doing out here? The coast's all the way over there.

name: train_dia437_utt0
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia437_utt1
chinese: 嘿！看看！这太不可思议了！乔伊居然屏住呼吸将近四分钟！
english: Hey! Check it out! This is unbelievable! Joey has been holding his breath for almost four minutes!

name: train_dia437_utt2
chinese: 伙计！你想要杀了我吗？！
english: Dude! What are yo you trying to kill me?!

name: train_dia438_utt0
chinese: 哎呀！
english: Ow!

name: train_dia438_utt1
chinese: 真的吗？嗯，就像其他人的公寓一样。它有房间、墙壁和天花板。
english: Really?! Well, it's just like everyone else's apartment. It's got rooms, walls, and ceilings.

name: train_dia438_utt2
chinese: 好的，我只是想看看你住在哪里。现在，带我参观一下。
english: Well, I just wanted to see where you lived. Now, give me the tour.

name: train_dia438_utt3
chinese: 哦，我的天啊！哦，我的天啊！
english: Oh my God! Oh my God!

name: train_dia438_utt4
chinese: 啊，这是客厅。
english: Ah well, this is the living room.

name: train_dia438_utt5
chinese: 好的。这是厨房。
english: All right. This is the kitchen.

name: train_dia438_utt7
chinese: 卧室。嗯，基本上就是你典型的...卧室。
english: The bedroom. Well it's pretty much your typical...  bedroom.

name: train_dia438_utt8
chinese: 我们仍然在门的这一边。
english: We're still on this side of the door.

name: train_dia438_utt9
chinese: 哈哈
english: Ha-ha

name: train_dia438_utt10
chinese: 是的，但我没有看到它。
english: Yeah, but I didn't get to see it.

name: train_dia438_utt11
chinese: 哦，糟糕！也许下次吧。谢谢你美好的晚上。
english: Oh shoot! Maybe next time.  Thanks for a lovely evening.

name: train_dia438_utt12
chinese: 那么，她是谁？
english: So um, who was she?

name: train_dia438_utt13
chinese: 哦，那是我告诉你的相亲，她打电话改到了今天。
english: Oh,  that was the blind date that I told you about, she called and switched it to today.

name: train_dia438_utt14
chinese: 你喜欢她吗？我只是以朋友的身份问一下，因为我对此完全没问题。
english: Did you like her? And I'm just asking as a friend, because I am totally fine with this.

name: train_dia438_utt15
chinese: 嗯，你看起来没事。
english: Well, you seem fine.

name: train_dia439_utt0
chinese: 嗯，我不认为这样，你知道的。
english: Well, I don't think this, y'know.

name: train_dia439_utt1
chinese: 不，不，不，我不会亲自对你做，我的意思是那样会很奇怪。
english: No, no, no, I wouldn't do you myself, I mean that would be weird.

name: train_dia439_utt2
chinese: 是的，不，我会让其他女孩来做。
english: Yeah, no, I'll get one of the other girls to do it.

name: train_dia439_utt3
chinese: 哦，这将会非常有趣！
english: Oh, this will be so much fun!

name: train_dia439_utt4
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia439_utt5
chinese: 你兴奋吗？
english: Are you excited?

name: train_dia439_utt6
chinese: 是的！嘿，莫妮卡和瑞秋在那里工作吗？
english: Yeah! Hey, do Monica and Rachel work there?

name: train_dia440_utt0
