chinese: 这个长凳，它是空的！我简直不敢相信我从来不知道这一点！哦，礼物们！！！
english: This bench, it's hollow! I can't believe I never knew that!  Oh, the presents!!!

name: train_dia583_utt6
chinese: 不，不要直接看着它们！
english: No, don't look directly at them!

name: train_dia583_utt7
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia583_utt8
chinese: 好的，不，我们可以看看它们！
english: Alright, no, we could look at them!

name: train_dia583_utt9
chinese: 我
english: I

name: train_dia584_utt0
chinese: 嗨！我很高兴你在这里，但是要等一会儿。我，我希望你先打个电话。
english: Hi! I'm so glad you're here, but it's gonna be a while. I-I wished you'd called first.

name: train_dia584_utt1
chinese: 哦，没关系，我稍后会带你爸爸回来。
english: Oh that's all right, I'm coming back later with your father.

name: train_dia584_utt2
chinese: 哦，太好了。
english: Oh good.

name: train_dia584_utt3
chinese: 我实际上在孩子出生之前需要和你谈话。
english: I actually needed to talk to you before the birth.

name: train_dia584_utt4
chinese: 好的，怎么了？
english: Okay, what's up?

name: train_dia584_utt5
chinese: 我带了一些东西想要给你，当然前提是你想要它。
english: I brought something that I want to give you, assuming of course that you want it.

name: train_dia584_utt6
chinese: 妈妈，你在问我要嫁给你吗？
english: Ma, you're asking me to marry you?

name: train_dia584_utt7
chinese: 这是你祖母的订婚戒指，我希望你把它给Rachel。
english: This is your grandmother's engagement ring, I want you to give it to Rachel.

name: train_dia584_utt8
chinese: 妈妈，不要，加油！谢谢你。
english: Mom no, come on! Thank you.

name: train_dia584_utt9
chinese: 请听我说！
english: Just hear me out!

name: train_dia585_utt0
chinese: 也许如果我更加关心，或者更加留意，或者...有一个子宫的话，这种情况可能就不会发生了。
english: Maybe this would've happened if I'd been more nurturing, or I'd paid more attention, or I... had a uterus.

name: train_dia585_utt1
chinese: 我简直不敢相信这个！
english: I can't believe this!

name: train_dia585_utt2
chinese: 我知道，你不配这样，你不是罗斯。
english: I know no, no, y'know you don't deserve this, you don't Ross.

name: train_dia585_utt3
chinese: 你是，你真的，你太好了。
english: You're, you're really, you're so good.

name: train_dia585_utt4
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: train_dia585_utt5
chinese: 而且你很甜。而且你很善良。
english: And you're so sweet.  And you're kind

name: train_dia585_utt6
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: train_dia585_utt7
chinese: 等待，等待，等待，等待，等待。
english: Wait, wait, wait, wait, wait.

name: train_dia585_utt8
chinese: 好的，没关系。
english: Okay, it's okay.

name: train_dia585_utt9
chinese: 等等，等等，等等。
english: Wait, wait, wait.

name: train_dia585_utt10
chinese: 我的脚卡在口袋里。
english: My foot is stuck in the pocket.

name: train_dia585_utt11
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia585_utt12
chinese: 不，我无法把它拿出来。
english: No, I can't get it out.

name: train_dia586_utt0
chinese: 你好，Rachel？
english: Rachel?

name: train_dia587_utt0
chinese: 是的。嗨，马克！
english: Yeah.  Hi Mark!

name: train_dia587_utt1
chinese: 嗨。我刚刚和乔安娜聊过，她很喜欢你。你得到了，你得到了这份工作。
english: Hi. I just talked to Joanna, and she loves you. You got it, you got the job.

name: train_dia587_utt2
chinese: 哦，我做了！
english: Oh, I did!

name: train_dia587_utt3
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: train_dia587_utt4
chinese: 哦，我的天啊！！
english: Oh my God!!

name: train_dia587_utt5
chinese: 恭喜...哦..哇
english: Congratulations...oh..wow

name: train_dia588_utt0
chinese: 我简直不敢相信我做了这件事！真是个白痴！
english: I can't believe I did this! What an idiot!

name: train_dia588_utt1
chinese: 哦，别再自责了！
english: Oh, stop beating yourself up!

name: train_dia588_utt2
chinese: 人们犯错误！
english: People make mistakes!

name: train_dia588_utt3
chinese: 这些事情发生了！
english: These things happen!

name: train_dia588_utt4
chinese: 你有没有忘记给我任何信息？
english: There aren't any message you've forgotten to give me are there?

name: train_dia588_utt5
chinese: 显然你不太擅长这个！
english: Apparently you're not very good at it!

name: train_dia588_utt6
chinese: 我
english: I

name: train_dia589_utt0
chinese: 费城。
english: Philadelphia.

name: train_dia589_utt1
chinese: 哦，我的天啊！她也是！哦，我起鸡皮疙瘩了。
english: Oh my God! So was she! Oh, I've got-I've got goose bumps.

name: train_dia589_utt2
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: train_dia589_utt3
chinese: 嗯，你知道我穿了好几层衣服，所以很暖和。
english: Well, y'know I'm wearing layers and it's warm.

name: train_dia589_utt4
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: train_dia589_utt5
chinese: 但是如果没有运气，没关系。这些混蛋可能不在乎你，但是宇宙在乎！这说了很多！
english: But if no look, okay. These jerks might not care about you, but the universe does! And that says a lot!

name: train_dia589_utt6
chinese: 你听到了吗？！
english: Did you hear that?!

name: train_dia589_utt7
chinese: 我不需要你们关心我！
english: I don't need you guys to care about me!

name: train_dia589_utt8
chinese: 因为宇宙在乎！
english: Because the universe cares!

name: train_dia589_utt9
chinese: 整个宇宙！
english: The whole universe!

name: train_dia589_utt10
chinese: 我真的希望他们稍微在意一点。
english: I really wished they'd care just a little bit though.

name: train_dia590_utt0
chinese: 我喜欢这个。它似乎在说：“我爱你，所以我不得不杀了你。”
english: I like this one.  It seems to say, "I love you and that's why I have to kill you."

name: train_dia590_utt1
chinese: 他们不可能都是坏的。找到那个让你眯起卧室的眼睛的地方。哦，就在那里。
english: They can't all be bad.  Find the one where you make your bedroom eyes. Ohh, there it is.

name: train_dia590_utt2
chinese: 哦，我的天啊！那些是我的卧室眼神吗？为什么你曾经和我睡过觉？
english: Oh my God! Those are my bedroom eyes?! Why did you ever sleep with me?

name: train_dia590_utt3
chinese: 你真的想拽那根线吗？
english: Do you really want to pull at that thread?

name: train_dia590_utt4
chinese: 我玩得非常开心！
english: I'm having a really good time!

name: train_dia590_utt5
chinese: 我也是！很抱歉地说，地铁里那个人舔了你的脖子。
english: Me too! I'm sorry that guy in the subway licked your neck.

name: train_dia590_utt6
chinese: 哦，不，没关系，他是个朋友。
english: Ohh. No that's okay, he's a friend.

name: train_dia590_utt7
chinese: 嘿，抱歉我可能有点冒昧，但是我有两张明晚舞厅舞蹈决赛的门票，如果你想去的话？
english: Hey uh, I don't mean to be presumptuous but I have these two tickets to the ballroom dancing finals tomorrow night if you want to go?

name: train_dia590_utt8
chinese: 是的，我嗯，你知道的，我是说我错过了半决赛，所以我会迷失的。
english: Yeah, I Well y'know I-I mean I missed the-the semi-finals, so I'd just be lost.

name: train_dia590_utt9
chinese: 我知道这真的很糟糕，但这些票是我从我的老板那里得到的，哦不！不！不！我的天啊！
english: I know it's really lame, but I got these tickets from my boss and Oh no! No! No! My God!

name: train_dia590_utt10
chinese: 好的，不要惊慌。我会走的。
english: Okay, don't freak out. I'll go.

name: train_dia590_utt11
chinese: 不，那是我前妻惠特尼。我现在不能和她打交道。那个女人疯了！
english: No it's Uh, my ex-wife Whitney is out there. I cannot deal with her right now. That woman is crazy!

name: train_dia590_utt12
chinese: 好的，我知道。等一下。嘿，罗斯？
english: Okay, I know. Hold on.  Hey Ross?

name: train_dia590_utt13
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: train_dia590_utt14
chinese: 是的，那个外面的是惠特尼，凯尔的前妻，你觉得你能转移她的注意力，这样我们就可以溜走吗？
english: Yeah, umm that's Whitney , Kyle's ex-wife out there, now do you think that you can y'know divert her so that we can slip out?

name: train_dia590_utt15
chinese: 什么？不可能！
english: What?! No!

name: train_dia590_utt16
chinese: 好吧，但是我有两张舞厅舞蹈决赛的门票。
english: Well okay but I have two tickets to the ballroom dance finals.

name: train_dia590_utt17
chinese: 看，我不这么认为，菲比。好吧，我会做的。但只是因为你是朋友。
english: Look, I don't think so Pheebs.  All right, I'll do it. But just because you're a friend.

name: train_dia591_utt0
chinese: 好吧，我-我-我已经完成了。你想要什么，罗斯？体育？国际新闻？公寓出租信息？
english: Well, I-I-I'm done with this. You want anything Ross? Sports? International? Apartment listings?

name: train_dia591_utt1
chinese: 我会参加体育运动。
english: I'll take sports.

name: train_dia591_utt2
chinese: 我的！
english: Mine!

name: train_dia591_utt3
chinese: 好的。嗯，国际的。
english: All right. Uhh, international.

name: train_dia592_utt0
chinese: 好的，听着，我知道你们要说什么
english: Okay, look, I-I know what you guys are going to say

name: train_dia592_utt1
chinese: 你们两个将会有非常多毛的孩子。
english: You two will have very hairy children.

name: train_dia592_utt2
chinese: 好的，我不知道你会这样说。
english: Okay, I didn't know you would say that.

name: train_dia592_utt3
chinese: 罗斯！珍妮丝？！
english: Ross! Janice?!

name: train_dia592_utt4
chinese: 好的，等一下！
english: All right, hold on!

name: train_dia592_utt5
chinese: 稍等。
english: Hold on.

name: train_dia592_utt6
chinese: 稍等。
english: Hold on.

name: train_dia592_utt7
chinese: 这是罗斯，好吗？
english: This is Ross, okay?

name: train_dia592_utt8
chinese: 他是我们的朋友。
english: He's our friend.

name: train_dia592_utt9
chinese: 他显然疯了。
english: He obviously went crazy.

name: train_dia592_utt10
chinese: 他显然失去了理智。
english: He obviously lost his mind.

name: train_dia592_utt11
chinese: 那么你真的会再见她吗？
english: So are you actually gonna see her again?

name: train_dia592_utt12
chinese: 菲比！不要给他灌输想法！
english: Phoebe! Don't put ideas in his head!

name: train_dia592_utt13
chinese: 该死的菲比！！
english: Damnit Phoebe!!

name: train_dia593_utt0
chinese: 嘿，我们不是要...吗？
english: Hey, don't we have to...

name: train_dia593_utt1
chinese: 是的，我们有，嗯嗯。
english: Yeah, we got, um-hmm.

name: train_dia593_utt2
chinese: 嗯，我觉得你真的，真的很棒...
english: Umm, I think you're really, really great...

name: train_dia593_utt3
chinese: 哦，天哪！
english: Oh God!

name: train_dia593_utt4
chinese: 这里我们又开始了。
english: Here we go again.

name: train_dia593_utt5
chinese: 为什么这种事情一直发生在我身上？
english: Why does this keep happening to me?

name: train_dia593_utt6
chinese: 这是我在传达的东西吗？
english: Is it something I'm putting out there?

name: train_dia593_utt7
chinese: 这是我的错吗？
english: Is this my fault?

name: train_dia593_utt8
chinese: 我是疯了吗？
english: Or am I just nuts?

name: train_dia593_utt9
chinese: 我-我-我-我-我不知道，我不知道该说什么。
english: I-I-I-I-I don't know, I don't know what to say.

name: train_dia593_utt10
chinese: 嘿伙计，这是一个家庭场所，请把鼠标放回房子里。
english: Hey buddy, this is a family place, put the mouse back in the house.

name: train_dia594_utt0
chinese: 等一下！
english: Wait!

name: train_dia594_utt1
chinese: 嗨，Terry！
english: Terry!

name: train_dia594_utt2
chinese: 请！
english: Please!

name: train_dia594_utt3
chinese: 看，我刚刚失去了另一份工作。
english: Look, I just lost my other job.

name: train_dia594_utt4
chinese: 好吗？
english: Okay?

name: train_dia594_utt5
chinese: 你不知道我有多么需要这个。
english: You have no idea how much I need this.

name: train_dia594_utt6
chinese: 请帮帮我，出于过去的情谊。
english: Please, help me out, for old times sake.

name: train_dia594_utt7
chinese: 这个可怜的家伙已经昏迷了五年。一切都没有希望了。
english: This poor guy's been in a coma for five years. It's hopeless.

name: train_dia594_utt8
chinese: 这不是没有希望！斯特赖克·拉莫雷博士是一个奇迹般的工作者。看，他来了。
english: It's not hopeless! Dr. Stryker Ramoray's a miracle worker. Look, here he comes.

name: train_dia594_utt9
chinese: 早上好。德雷克，我是你的兄弟斯特赖克。你能听到我说话吗？
english: Good morning.  Drake, it's your brother Stryker. Can you hear me?

name: train_dia594_utt10
chinese: 我回来了宝贝！哈哈哈！
english: I'm back baby! Ha-ha-ha!

name: train_dia595_utt0
chinese: 那个孩子在飞机上真的很狠狠地踢了我一脚。
english: That kid really kicked me hard on the plane.

name: train_dia595_utt1
chinese: 嗯，你确实拉了他的头发。
english: Well you did pull his hair.

name: train_dia595_utt2
chinese: 他拿走了我的零食！
english: He took my snack!

name: train_dia595_utt3
chinese: 我不想再卷入这件事了！
english: I'm not getting into this again!

name: train_dia595_utt4
chinese: 好的！哦天啊，你知道吗？这真的很糟糕。
english: Okay! Oh God, y'know what? It's really bad.

name: train_dia595_utt5
chinese: 好的，我告诉过你不要走。这里。那里。好的。
english: Well, I told you not to walk. Here.  There. Okay.

name: train_dia595_utt6
chinese: 这并不意味着什么，是吗？
english: This doesn't mean anything, does it?

name: train_dia596_utt0
chinese: 当然！只有白痴才会穿这种东西，如果没有车的话！对吗？
english: Of course! Only an idiot would wear this stuff if you didn't have the car! Right?

name: train_dia596_utt1
chinese: 那是真的。
english: That is true.

name: train_dia596_utt2
chinese: 是的，但只有天才才会吞下声波爆破枪。
english: Yeah, but only a genius would swallow a sonic blaster gun.

name: train_dia596_utt3
chinese: 哦，我去过那里。是的，我要去开我的保时捷。
english: Oh, I've been there. Yeah, I am gonna go drive my Porsche.

name: train_dia596_utt4
chinese: 乔伊，你知道你实际上没有一个。
english: Joey, you know you don't actually have one.

name: train_dia596_utt5
chinese: 加油！你在做什么？！我正在扮演角色！你能和她说话吗？
english: Come on! What are you doing?! I'm in character! Would you talk to her!

name: train_dia596_utt6
chinese: 啊，我觉得它刚刚动了。它真的在戳我。
english: Ahh, I think it just moved. It's really poking me.

name: train_dia596_utt7
chinese: 好的，就这样，我们要去急诊室了。
english: All right, that's it, we're going to the emergency room.

name: train_dia596_utt8
chinese: 什么？不，你不能，你不能把我留在这里和他们一起！我们正在照顾孩子！
english: What?! No, you can't, you can't leave me here with them! We're baby-sitting!

name: train_dia596_utt9
chinese: 宝宝们都睡着了，我相信你自己一个人一段时间会没问题的！
english: The babies are asleep, I'm sure you'll be okay on your own for a while!

name: train_dia596_utt10
chinese: 但是你-你不能把我留给他们！我们-我们是一个团队！我们正在打区域防守！他们会三人包夹我！
english: But you-you can't leave me with them! We-we're a team! We're playing a zone! They're gonna triple team me!

name: train_dia596_utt11
chinese: 他喉咙里卡了一块塑料东西，我们得去医院。
english: He's got something plastic lodged in his throat, we've got to go to the hospital.

name: train_dia596_utt12
chinese: 但是不，因为医生无法帮助他，这只是会自然地在他的体内通过，大约需要七年的时间。
english: But no, because a doctor won't be able to help him, it's just gonna y'know naturally pass through his system in like seven years.

name: train_dia596_utt13
chinese: 我认为那是口香糖。
english: I think that's gum.

name: train_dia596_utt14
chinese: 我非常确定它是枪。
english: I'm pretty sure it's gun.

name: train_dia596_utt15
chinese: 好的，听着，这真的很疼。我们走吧。
english: Okay, listen this really hurts. Let's go.

name: train_dia596_utt16
chinese: 一个真正的男人不会只是跑去医院！不！克罗格会怎么做？
english: A real man wouldn't just run to the hospital!  No! What would, what would Krog do?

name: train_dia596_utt17
chinese: 那是我唯一能让他明白的方式。
english: That was the only way I could get him to

name: train_dia596_utt18
chinese: 嗨！盖勒一家好吗？
english: Hi! How are the Gellers?

name: train_dia596_utt19
chinese: 不要叫我们那个名字！
english: Don't call us that!

name: train_dia596_utt20
chinese: 法官不让我们取消婚姻！现在我们必须离婚！！保时捷在你身上呕吐了吗？
english: The judge wouldn't let us get an annulment! Now we gotta get a divorce!! Did a Porsch throw up on you?

name: train_dia596_utt21
chinese: 嘿！这是保时捷！！
english: Hey! It's Porsche!!

name: train_dia597_utt0
chinese: 嘿，亲爱的！
english: Hey sweetie!

name: train_dia597_utt1
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia597_utt2
chinese: 这个沙发没有靠背！
english: There's no back to this couch!

name: train_dia597_utt3
chinese: 为什么你在阅读这个？你讨厌这种东西。
english: Why are you reading this? You hate this kind of stuff.

name: train_dia597_utt4
chinese: 是的，我知道，但我想试一试，你知道吗？
english: Yeah I know, but I figured a shot y'know?

name: train_dia597_utt5
chinese: 也许其中一个故事会让我哭泣，然后你就不会认为我是那种，你知道的，内心已经死了的人。
english: Maybe one of those stories would make me cry and then you wouldn't think I was y'know, all dead inside.

name: train_dia597_utt6
chinese: 哦，那太甜蜜了！看啊，钱德勒，我不在乎你不能哭，我爱你。
english: Oh that's so sweet! Look Chandler I don't care if you can't cry, I love you.

name: train_dia597_utt7
chinese: 哦，这让我在我空洞的铁皮胸腔里感到如此温暖。
english: Oh that makes me feel so warm in my hollow tin chest.

name: train_dia597_utt8
chinese: 停下来！
english: Stop it!

name: train_dia597_utt9
chinese: 不，我的意思是，想真正认真考虑一下，我们结婚了，我们站在祭坛前，我就像这样。
english: No, I mean, come on, seriously think about it, we get married, we're up at the altar and I'm like this.

name: train_dia597_utt10
chinese: 我不会在意，因为我知道你会在这里感受到一切。
english: I won't care, because I know you will be feeling it all in here.

name: train_dia597_utt11
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: train_dia598_utt0
chinese: 当然他是！
english: Of course he is!

name: train_dia598_utt1
chinese: 你认为我会把我的儿子当作借口吗？
english: What, do you think I'd just use my son as-as an excuse?

name: train_dia598_utt2
chinese: 你认为我是什么样的父亲？
english: What kind of father do you think I am?

name: train_dia598_utt3
chinese: 好的，对不起。

name: train_dia628_utt9
chinese: 嗯，直到我回到家才意识到。
english: Well, I didn't realize until I got home.

name: train_dia628_utt10
chinese: 我不打算只穿一只鞋走回来！
english: I wasn't gonna walk all the way back down here with one shoe!

name: train_dia628_utt11
chinese: 我要去找那个人的车，并在挡风玻璃上留个便条。
english: I'm gonna go find that guy's car and leave a note on the windshield.

name: train_dia628_utt12
chinese: 哦，好的，当他回来拿钥匙时，我一定会把你的鞋子给他。
english: Oh good, when he comes back for his keys, I'll be sure to give him your shoe.

name: train_dia628_utt13
chinese: 太好了！谢谢。
english: Great! Thanks.

name: train_dia629_utt0
chinese: 好的，这是一个有趣的小丑。有趣的小丑只适用于他的午睡后，而不是午睡前，否则他就无法入睡。
english: Ok, and this is Funny Clown. Funny Clown is only for after his naps, not before his naps or he won't sleep.

name: train_dia629_utt1
chinese: 卡罗尔，我们之前已经经历过这个了，好吗？
english: Carol, we've been through this before, ok?

name: train_dia629_utt2
chinese: 我们度过了愉快的时光。
english: We have a good time.

name: train_dia629_utt3
chinese: 我们笑，我们玩。
english: We laugh, we play.

name: train_dia629_utt4
chinese: 就像我们是父子一样。
english: It's like we're father and son.

name: train_dia629_utt5
chinese: 亲爱的，放松点。罗斯对他很好。不要看起来那么惊讶。我是一个可爱的人。
english: Honey, relax. Ross is great with him.  Don't look so surprised. I'm a lovely person.

name: train_dia629_utt6
chinese: 哦，这太可爱了。
english: Oh, this is so cute.

name: train_dia629_utt7
chinese: 哦，我给他买了那个。
english: Oh, I got that for him.

name: train_dia629_utt8
chinese: 我的妈妈们爱我。那很聪明。
english: My mommies love me. That's clever.

name: train_dia629_utt9
chinese: 你好？
english: Hello?

name: train_dia629_utt10
chinese: 哦，嗨，Ju嗨，犹太人！
english: Oh, Hi, Ju  Hi, Jew!

name: train_dia629_utt11
chinese: 嗯，是吗？
english: Uh huh?

name: train_dia629_utt12
chinese: 嗯，是吗？
english: Uh huh?

name: train_dia629_utt13
chinese: 好的。嗯，当然，那会很棒。
english: Ok.  Um, sure, that'd be great.

name: train_dia629_utt14
chinese: 再见，到时候见。
english: See ya then.

name: train_dia629_utt15
chinese: 再见。
english: Bye.

name: train_dia629_utt16
chinese: 你刚刚说了“嗨，犹太人”吗？
english: Did you just say Hi, Jew?

name: train_dia629_utt17
chinese: 是的。嗯，是的，我做到了。那是我的朋友埃迪·莫斯科维茨。是的，他喜欢它。这再次确认了他的信念。
english: Yes. Uh, yes, I did. That was my friend, Eddie Moskowitz. Yeah, he likes it. Reaffirms his faith.

name: train_dia630_utt0
chinese: 现在你去吧！我不想让我最好的客人累坏了眼睛！
english: Now there you go! I wouldn't want my best guest to strain her eyes!

name: train_dia630_utt1
chinese: 谢谢莫妮卡！
english: Thanks Monica!

name: train_dia630_utt2
chinese: 那个味道让你感到不舒服吗？
english: Does that smell bother you?

name: train_dia630_utt3
chinese: 乔伊那里有什么味道？不，我在这里几乎闻不到。
english: What the smell from Joey's? No, I can hardly smell it over here.

name: train_dia630_utt4
chinese: 好的，如果你能的话就告诉我，因为你知道我可以做一个派来掩盖它。
english: Well you let me know if you can, because y'know I can bake a pie to cover it.

name: train_dia630_utt5
chinese: 我能闻到一点点，烤这个派。
english: I can smell it a little, bake the pie.

name: train_dia630_utt6
chinese: 好的！
english: Okay!

name: train_dia630_utt7
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: train_dia630_utt8
chinese: 你好？哦，是的，请等一分钟。有人找你。是消防检查员。
english: Hello?  Oh yes, one minute please.  It's for you. It's the fire inspector.

name: train_dia630_utt9
chinese: 哦！喂？是的，我是菲比。真的吗？
english: Oh!  Hello?  Yeah this is Phoebe.  Really?!

name: train_dia630_utt10
chinese: 是的，事实证明不是直发器引起了火灾。
english: Yeah, so it turns out that it wasn't the hair straightener that started the fire.

name: train_dia630_utt11
chinese: 不，不是的，是蜡烛。
english: No-no, it was the candles.

name: train_dia630_utt12
chinese: 离开蜡烛不加看管是非常不好的。
english: It's very not good leaving candles unattended.

name: train_dia630_utt13
chinese: 事实上，在消防学校教给你的第一件事情之一是“嗯嗯，好的”。
english: In fact, one of the first things they teach you in fire school is  Uhh Uhh Okay.

name: train_dia630_utt14
chinese: 好的，我现在必须走了。
english: Well, I have to go now.

name: train_dia631_utt0
chinese: 乔伊向我求婚。
english: Joey proposed to me.

name: train_dia632_utt0
chinese: 他疯了吗？！你刚刚生了罗斯的孩子！
english: Is he crazy?! You just had Ross’s baby!

name: train_dia632_utt1
chinese: 好的，我-我说是的。
english: Well, I-I said yes.

name: train_dia632_utt2
chinese: 什么？！
english: What?!

name: train_dia632_utt3
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: train_dia632_utt4
chinese: 你刚刚生了罗斯的孩子！
english: You just had Ross’s baby!

name: train_dia632_utt5
chinese: 这太不合适了。
english: It’s-it’s so  inappropriate.

name: train_dia632_utt6
chinese: 不，情况比那更糟糕。
english: No, it’s worse than that.

name: train_dia632_utt7
chinese: 这是错误的。
english: It’s wrong.

name: train_dia632_utt8
chinese: 它是...它比我的大！
english: It’s… It is bigger than  mine!

name: train_dia632_utt9
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: train_dia632_utt10
chinese: 你不能嫁给他！
english: You can’t marry him!

name: train_dia632_utt11
chinese: 为什么不呢？我不想一个人做这件事！而且他是个如此温柔的人，他非常爱我。
english: Why not? I don’t want to do this alone! And he’s such a sweet  guy and he loves me so much.

name: train_dia632_utt12
chinese: 你喜欢他吗？
english: Well do you love him?

name: train_dia632_utt13
chinese: 当然。
english: Sure.

name: train_dia632_utt14
chinese: 确定吗？
english: Sure?

name: train_dia632_utt15
chinese: 是的，我的意思是无论如何。
english: Yeah, I mean whatever.

name: train_dia632_utt16
chinese: 亲爱的，问题是...你真的想嫁给乔伊吗？
english: Honey, the question is…do you really want to marry Joey?

name: train_dia632_utt17
chinese: 不，不是的。你能帮个忙去告诉他吗？
english: No. No, I don’t. Could you be a dear and go tell him?

name: train_dia633_utt0
chinese: 所以，你们两个结婚了，是吗？发生了什么事？你们只是渐行渐远了吗？
english: So-so you two were married huh? What happened? You just drift apart?

name: train_dia633_utt1
chinese: 新娘来了。
english: Here comes the bride.

name: train_dia633_utt2
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，莫妮卡！
english: Oh my God Monica!

name: train_dia633_utt3
chinese: 我想每天都穿这个。
english: I wanna wear this everyday.

name: train_dia633_utt4
chinese: 你看起来很漂亮。
english: You look so beautiful.

name: train_dia633_utt5
chinese: 我为自己感到非常开心。
english: I'm so happy for me.

name: train_dia633_utt6
chinese: 你好？
english: Hello?

name: train_dia633_utt7
chinese: 嘿！钱德勒已经出现了吗？
english: Hey! Did Chandler show up yet?

name: train_dia633_utt8
chinese: 是的，我们把他找回来了。一切都好。
english: Yeah, we got him back. Everything's fine.

name: train_dia633_utt9
chinese: 该死！
english: Damnit!

name: train_dia634_utt0
chinese: 我会的！听着，我不想让你再教导我儿子那些东西了。好吗？
english: I will be! Listen, I don't want you teaching my son that stuff anymore. Okay?

name: train_dia634_utt1
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: train_dia634_utt2
chinese: 好的，但是我要告诉你，一旦我教会他那些东西，他就叫我有趣的雷切尔阿姨。
english: Fine, but I'll have you know that once I taught him that stuff he called me Fun Aunt Rachel.

name: train_dia634_utt3
chinese: 我喜欢做有趣的雷切尔阿姨，但如果你愿意，我会回到无聊和不舒服的雷切尔阿姨。
english: And I loved being Fun Aunt Rachel but I'll go back to being Boring and Uncomfortable Aunt Rachel if that's what you want!

name: train_dia634_utt4
chinese: 不，那不是我想要的。嗯，我很高兴你们之间有了默契，但是我
english: No that's not what I want. Uh, I'm glad you guys were bonding but I

name: train_dia634_utt5
chinese: 看，他没有兄弟姐妹，有人得教他这些东西！
english: Look he doesn't have any brothers or sisters, somebody's gonna have to teach him this stuff!

name: train_dia634_utt6
chinese: 而且我也没有教他任何一个正常六岁孩子不知道的东西！
english: And I haven't taught him anything that a normal 6-year-old doesn't know anyway!

name: train_dia634_utt7
chinese: 废话！！
english: Crap!!

name: train_dia634_utt8
chinese: 我得走了！
english: I gotta go!

name: train_dia635_utt0
chinese: 看那个！看那个！他们正在进入头等舱休息室！你知道里面有什么吗？
english: Look at that! Look at that! They're going into the first class lounge! Do you know what they have in there?

name: train_dia635_utt1
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: train_dia635_utt2
chinese: 我也是！我们必须进去！
english: Me neither! We have to get in!

name: train_dia635_utt3
chinese: 就像你属于这里一样行动。
english: Just act like you belong.

name: train_dia635_utt4
chinese: 哦，我的天啊！橙子！
english: Oh my God! Oranges!

name: train_dia635_utt5
chinese: 嘘！很高兴再次见到你。
english: Shh!  Nice to see you again.

name: train_dia635_utt6
chinese: 先生，请问可以看一下您的票吗？
english: Uh sir, may I see your tickets please?

name: train_dia635_utt7
chinese: 是的，当然可以。
english: Yes, of course.

name: train_dia635_utt8
chinese: 对不起，请你移动一下拇指好吗？我看不到座位号码。
english: I'm sorry, would you move your thumb? I can't see the seat number.

name: train_dia635_utt9
chinese: 哦，没关系，我记住了。是1A。
english: Oh that's all right, I have it memorized. It's 1A.

name: train_dia636_utt0
chinese: 好的！
english: Okay!

name: train_dia636_utt1
chinese: 你知道吗？
english: Y'know what?

name: train_dia636_utt2
chinese: 我意识到为了没有丈夫和孩子而生气是愚蠢的。
english: I realized it was stupid to get upset about not having a husband and kids.

name: train_dia636_utt3
chinese: 我真正需要的只是一个计划。
english: All I really needed was a plan.

name: train_dia636_utt4
chinese: 我想要有三个孩子。
english: See I wanna have three kids

name: train_dia636_utt5
chinese: 哦，让我猜猜，你想同时拥有它们，并且你想为你的兄弟拥有它们。
english: Oh let me guess, and you wanna have them all at the same time and you wanna have them for your brother.

name: train_dia636_utt6
chinese: 正如我所说的，到我35岁的时候，我可能会有三个孩子中的第一个，这给了我五年的时间。
english: As I was saying I should probably have the first of the three kids by the time I'm 35 which gives me five years.

name: train_dia637_utt0
chinese: 你花了一百美元。那是限制。你完蛋了！
english: You spent a hundred dollars. That's the limit. You're screwed!

name: train_dia637_utt1
chinese: 嗯，实际上，我在实际日期之前就送了花。所以从技术上讲，
english: Uh actually, I sent the flowers before the actual date. So technically,

name: train_dia637_utt2
chinese: 哦哦！原来是这样啊？是吗，我也可以违反规则，你知道的！
english: Oh-oh! So that's the way it's gonna be huh? Yeah I can break the rules too y'know!

name: train_dia637_utt3
chinese: 哦，是吗？你打算做什么？
english: Oh yeah? What are you gonna do?

name: train_dia637_utt4
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: train_dia637_utt5
chinese: 为什么我不感到惊讶？
english: Why am I not surprised?

name: train_dia637_utt6
chinese: 你知道吗，罗斯？我不会让你逃脱这件事的！
english: Y'know what Ross? I'm not gonna let you get away with this!

name: train_dia637_utt7
chinese: 我认为你没有太多选择。
english: I don't think you have much choice.

name: train_dia637_utt8
chinese: 好吧，我们会看到的！
english: Well we'll see!

name: train_dia637_utt9
chinese: 再见！
english: Bye-bye!

name: train_dia637_utt10
chinese: 是的，再见！嘿！所以只是一层薄薄的涂层吗？
english: Yeah bye-bye!  Hey! So just a light layer?

name: train_dia637_utt11
chinese: 是的。是的。就在这里和那里。
english: Yes. Yes. Just here  and there .

name: train_dia638_utt0
chinese: 爸爸？
english: Dad?

name: train_dia638_utt1
chinese: 我在这里！
english: I'm here!

name: train_dia638_utt2
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia638_utt3
chinese: 嗨，上帝，感觉就像昨天你们还经常出来看我工作一样。
english: Hi. God, it seems like just yesterday you guys used to come out to watch me work.

name: train_dia638_utt4
chinese: 爸爸，我们-我们无法相信你要卖房子。
english: Dad, we-we can't believe you're selling the house.

name: train_dia638_utt5
chinese: 好了，是时候让一个新的家庭开始他们在这里的回忆了，希望他们的支票在他们发现地基上的裂缝和天花板上的石棉之前能够兑现。
english: Well, it's time for a new family to start their memories here and hopefully their check will clear before they find the crack in the foundation and the asbestos in the ceiling.

name: train_dia638_utt6
chinese: 让我们拿起我们的东西，离开这里。
english: Let's grab our stuff and get the hell out of here.

name: train_dia638_utt7
chinese: 对不起，我们不能再存储你的童年物品了。
english: I'm sorry we can't store your childhood things anymore.

name: train_dia638_utt8
chinese: 哦，没关系，我迫不及待地想再次看到一切！所有的回忆
english: Oh, that's okay, I can't wait to see everything again! All of the memories

name: train_dia638_utt9
chinese: 嗯，我不知道这些盒子里面装了什么，但我知道有六个或七个。
english: Well, I don't know what's in the boxes down here, but I do know there are six or seven

name: train_dia638_utt10
chinese: 我过去常常
english: I used to

name: train_dia638_utt11
chinese: 是的，不像你过去那样喜欢玩生面糊吃者了。
english: Yeah, not as much as you used to love to play uncooked batter eater.

name: train_dia638_utt12
chinese: 嘿，期望一个孩子等待是不合理的。
english: Hey, it is unreasonable to expect a child to wait for a

name: train_dia639_utt0
chinese: 好的，通风口已打开。
english: Ok, got the vent open.

name: train_dia639_utt1
chinese: 嗨，我是本。我是医院工作的本。本来了...拯救大家！
english: Hi, I'm Ben. I'm hospital worker Ben. It's Ben... to the rescue!

name: train_dia639_utt2
chinese: 本，你准备好了吗？
english: Ben, you ready?

name: train_dia639_utt3
chinese: 好的，把你的脚给我。
english: All right, gimme your foot.

name: train_dia639_utt4
chinese: 好的，三，本。
english: Ok, on three, Ben.

name: train_dia639_utt5
chinese: 一，二，三。
english: One, two, three.

name: train_dia639_utt6
chinese: 好的，就这样，本。
english: Ok, That's it, Ben.

name: train_dia639_utt7
chinese: 你看到了什么？
english: What do you see?

name: train_dia639_utt8
chinese: 嗯，苏珊，我看到了一个看起来像是一个黑暗的通风口。等一下。是的，事实上它确实是一个黑暗的通风口。
english: Well, Susan, I see what appears to be a dark vent. Wait. Yes, it is in fact a dark vent.

name: train_dia639_utt9
chinese: 菲比，它开了！它开了！
english: Phoebs, It's open! It's open!

name: train_dia639_utt10
chinese: 等一下！你忘记了你的腿！
english: Wait! You forgot your legs!

name: train_dia640_utt0
chinese: 您的简历非常令人印象深刻，格林女士。我特别喜欢在这里看到您关于实施新的文件系统的内容。
english: You have a very impressive resume, Ms. Green. I especially like what I see here about implementing a new filing system.

name: train_dia640_utt1
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: train_dia640_utt2
chinese: 文件系统？
english: Filing system?

name: train_dia640_utt3
chinese: 哦-哦！
english: Oh-oh!

name: train_dia640_utt4
chinese: 你是指那些小小的彩色标签，你把它们贴在所有文件夹上吗？
english: You mean those-those little colored labels you put on all the folders?

name: train_dia640_utt5
chinese: 它确实让文件柜内部变得明亮起来。
english: It certainly did brighten up the inside of the filing cabinets.

name: train_dia640_utt6
chinese: 嗯，他们做的不仅仅是那些。
english: Well, they uh, they-they do more than that.

name: train_dia640_utt7
chinese: 我注意到你被赋予了许多相当重要的责任。
english: I notice that you've been trusted with a lot of rather important responsibilities.

name: train_dia640_utt8
chinese: 是的，Joanna确实是我一个令人难以置信的导师。
english: Yes, Joanna really has been an incredible mentor to me.

name: train_dia640_utt9
chinese: 哦。而且Rachel在为我准备早餐面包方面真的非常出色。她几乎总能准确地拿到我想要的。
english: Oh. And Rachel has been really incredible in getting my morning bagel for me. It's amazing how she gets it right almost

name: train_dia640_utt10
chinese: 当然，我有比那更多的责任。
english: I-I-I of course, I have more responsibilities than that.

name: train_dia640_utt11
chinese: 哦，是的，还有咖啡。瑞秋可以一次拿两样东西！
english: Oh yes, well there's the coffee too.  Rachel can carry two things at once!

name: train_dia640_utt12
chinese: 是的，那非常好。现在，这份工作的一个重要部分是培养个人关系，尤其是与设计师的关系。
english: Yes, that's very good. Now a uh, big part of this job is cultivating personal relationships, especially with designers.

name: train_dia640_utt13
chinese: 是的，我意识到了。
english: Yes, I realize that

name: train_dia640_utt14
chinese: 而且Rachel对此应该没有任何问题。唯一的问题可能是变得过于友好，如果你知道我的意思。
english: And Rachel shouldn't have any problem with that. The only problem might be getting a little too friendly, if you know what I mean.

name: train_dia640_utt15
chinese: 我喜欢与设计师一起工作！
english: I love working with designers!

name: train_dia640_utt16
chinese: 和他们在一起，和他们之下，有什么区别？嗯，瑞秋？
english: With them, under them, what's the difference? Eh, Rach?

name: train_dia641_utt0
chinese: 钱德勒，你有一个助理对吗？
english: Chandler, you have an assistant right?

name: train_dia641_utt1
chinese: 她打电话了吗？你告诉她我生病了，对吗？一直告诉她我生病了！
english: Did she call? You-you told her I was sick right? Always tell her I am sick!

name: train_dia642_utt0
chinese: 钱德勒，亲爱的，听我说，我知道你能做到。好吗？你有一个美丽的微笑。
english: Chandler, listen to me sweetie, I know you can do this. Okay? You have a beautiful smile.

name: train_dia642_utt1
chinese: 我做什么？
english: I do?

name: train_dia642_utt2
chinese: 是的！好吧，也许你不必微笑。让我们试试其他的。让我们试试嗯，试试看看性感的样子。
english: Yeah!  All right, maybe you don't have to smile. Let's try something else. Let's try umm, try looking sexy.

name: train_dia642_utt3
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: train_dia642_utt4

name: train_dia886_utt15
chinese: 孕妇杀死四人？
english: Pregnant Woman Slays Four?

name: train_dia886_utt16
chinese: 菲比，他们没有让你为那些刀付钱，对吗？
english: Phoebe, they didn't make you pay for those knives, did they?

name: train_dia886_utt17
chinese: 不！
english: No!

name: train_dia886_utt20
chinese: 亲爱的，你只靠卖刀子是赚不够钱来帮助弗兰克和爱丽丝的。
english: Honey, you're not gonna make enough money to help Frank and Alice just by selling knives.

name: train_dia886_utt21
chinese: 不不，我知道，但我只是必须赚够钱来完成我的计划的第二部分。
english: No-no, I know that, but I just have to make enough money for the second part of my plan.

name: train_dia886_utt22
chinese: 你计划的第二部分是什么？
english: What's the second part of your plan?

name: train_dia887_utt0
chinese: 是的，没错。
english: Yes that's right.

name: train_dia887_utt1
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: train_dia887_utt2
chinese: 我试图攻击两个女人，但没有成功。
english: I tired attacking two women, did not work.

name: train_dia887_utt3
chinese: 什么？！
english: What?!

name: train_dia887_utt4
chinese: 不，我的意思是没关系，我的意思是，他们是我的朋友。
english: No, I mean it's okay, I mean, they're-they're my friends.

name: train_dia887_utt5
chinese: 事实上，我-我-我曾经和其中一个结婚。
english: In fact, I-I-I was married to one of them.

name: train_dia887_utt6
chinese: 让我弄清楚一下，你袭击了你的前妻？！
english: Let me get this straight man, you attacked your ex-wife?!

name: train_dia887_utt7
chinese: 哦，不！
english: Oh, no!

name: train_dia887_utt8
chinese: 不可以！
english: No-no!

name: train_dia887_utt9
chinese: 不，我累了！
english: No, I tired!

name: train_dia887_utt10
chinese: 但是我不能。
english: But I couldn't.

name: train_dia887_utt11
chinese: 这就是为什么我在这里。
english: That's why I'm here.

name: train_dia887_utt12
chinese: 也许我们可以一起攻击他们？
english: Maybe we could attack them together?

name: train_dia887_utt13
chinese: 那-那是不行的。
english: That-that's a no.

name: train_dia888_utt0
chinese: 什么？不！不，我不会停下来的。我是红色罗斯！
english: What? No! No, I'm not stopping. I'm Red Ross!

name: train_dia888_utt1
chinese: 伙计，如果你再出去，你会死的，罗斯！
english: Dude, if you go back out there, you're gonna be Dead Ross!

name: train_dia888_utt2
chinese: 我不在乎！我不会放弃！我坚持要完成这个游戏！
english: I don't care! I am not quitting! I insist on finishing this game!

name: train_dia888_utt3
chinese: 好吧，好吧，如果你坚持要这样做，至少让我帮你一下。
english: All right, all right, if you insist on doing this, at least let me help you.

name: train_dia888_utt4
chinese: 不，天哪不要！那不是一个适合女人的地方。那些家伙会抓住任何东西。
english: No, God no! That is no place for a woman. Those guys will grab anything.

name: train_dia888_utt5
chinese: 不，那不是我说的。我只是可能知道一些可以帮助你造成一些痛苦的事情。
english: No. That's not what I'm saying. I just may know a few things that might help you inflict some pain.

name: train_dia888_utt6
chinese: 我喜欢那个。
english: I like that.

name: train_dia888_utt7
chinese: 是吗？请仔细听，德文的脚踝很弱。
english: Yeah? Listen closely, Devon has got a weak ankle.

name: train_dia888_utt8
chinese: 嗯？
english: Huh?

name: train_dia888_utt9
chinese: 一个猛烈的踢，他就会退后。
english: One swift kick and he'll back off.

name: train_dia888_utt10
chinese: 好的，脚踝受伤了，明白了！
english: All right, bad ankle, got it!

name: train_dia888_utt11
chinese: 那个长着胡子的大个子，他的髋关节有问题。
english: And that big bloke with the beard, he has got a trick hip.

name: train_dia888_utt12
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: train_dia888_utt13
chinese: 嗯，还有那边的大卫，我听说他不戴杯子。
english: And uh, and David over there, I heard he doesn't wear a cup.

name: train_dia888_utt14
chinese: 是吗？我可以用那个，骗髋，不用杯子，好吗！好的！好的！
english: Yeah? I can use that, trick hip, no cup, okay! Okay!

name: train_dia888_utt15
chinese: 嗯，Liam的膝盖不好。你打他一下，他就会像灯一样倒下。
english: And uh, Liam, Liam's got bad knees. You hit him right and he'll go down like a lamp.

name: train_dia888_utt16
chinese: 但是，但是，利亚姆是我的队友。
english: But-but, Liam's on my team.

name: train_dia888_utt17
chinese: 我不在乎！你只管把他带来！
english: I don't care! You just get him!

name: train_dia888_utt18
chinese: 我要去找他！好的，我要回去了！
english: I'm gonna go get him! Okay, I am going back in!

name: train_dia888_utt19
chinese: 红色的罗斯！好的。
english: The Red Ross! Okay.

name: train_dia889_utt0
chinese: 哦！哦，顺便说一下？
english: Oh!  Oh by the way?

name: train_dia889_utt1
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Uh-hmm.

name: train_dia889_utt2
chinese: 詹姆斯·布罗林？
english: James Brolin?

name: train_dia889_utt3
chinese: 哦，我知道。我只能想到两个名字，他和埃德·贝格利·朱尔回，然后我记起他是同性恋。
english: Oh, I know. I could only think of two names, him and Ed Begley Jr. and then I remembered he's gay.

name: train_dia889_utt4
chinese: 艾德·贝格利·朱尔不是同性恋。
english: Ed Begley Jr. is not gay.

name: train_dia889_utt5
chinese: 真的吗？！
english: Really?!

name: train_dia890_utt0
chinese: 你好？
english: Hello?

name: train_dia890_utt1
chinese: 你好，罗斯在吗？
english: Hello, is Ross there?

name: train_dia890_utt2
chinese: 嗯，不是他。我可以帮你传个口信吗？
english: Uh no, he's not. Can I take a message?

name: train_dia890_utt3
chinese: 是的，这是罗素，罗斯的离婚律师，请告诉他，由于我没有收到他的消息，我认为他决定尝试修复婚姻了。
english: Yes, this Russell, Ross's divorce lawyer, just tell him that since I haven't heard from him, I assume he's decided to give the marriage a try.

name: train_dia890_utt4
chinese: 罗斯又结婚了，不要啊！！！！！！！
english: Ross got married again Nooooooo!!!!!!!!!

name: train_dia891_utt0
chinese: 哦哦！好的，她在踢！
english: Oh-oh! Okay, she's kicking!

name: train_dia891_utt1
chinese: 哦！她正在你的体内成长。
english: Oh!  She's growing inside you.

name: train_dia891_utt2
english: Whoa!!

name: train_dia891_utt3
chinese: 哦！
english: Oh!

name: train_dia891_utt4
chinese: 哇，那是一个很大的事情。
english: Wow that was a big one.

name: train_dia891_utt5
chinese: 我认为那是我被拒绝的最年轻的女孩。
english: I think that's the youngest girl ever to reject me.

name: train_dia891_utt6
chinese: 哦，嘿，你们！
english: Oh hey you guys!

name: train_dia892_utt0
chinese: 当然，我可以一直陪你，直到我必须见你。为什么你不去呢？
english: Sure, I can hang out til I have to meet ya.  What uh How come you're not going?

name: train_dia892_utt1
chinese: 我有一次工作面试，我必须准备好。
english: I have a job interview I have to get ready for.

name: train_dia892_utt2
chinese: 我以为你已经有工作了。
english: I thought you already have a job.

name: train_dia892_utt3
chinese: 而且人们说你不注意。
english: And people say you don't pay attention.

name: train_dia892_utt4
chinese: 不，这是一份更好的工作。
english: No, this is a much better job.

name: train_dia892_utt5
chinese: 这是一家为其他公司进行数据重构和统计因子分析的公司的副总裁。
english: It's vice-president of a company that does data reconfiguration and statistical factoring for other companies.

name: train_dia892_utt6
chinese: 哇！你怎么知道怎么做那个？！
english: Wow! How do you know how to do that?!

name: train_dia892_utt7
chinese: 这就是我现在所做的。
english: That's what I do now.

name: train_dia892_utt8
chinese: 嘿，乔伊，来尝尝这个。
english: Hey Joey, come taste this.

name: train_dia892_utt9
chinese: 这是什么？
english: What is it?

name: train_dia892_utt10
chinese: 记得那个给我差评的家伙吗？嗯，我要报复他！
english: Remember that guy that gave me a bad review? Well  I'm getting my revenge!

name: train_dia892_utt11
chinese: 你煮了他？
english: You cooked him?

name: train_dia892_utt12
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: train_dia892_utt13
chinese: 他在纽约大学教授一门关于食物批评的课程，所以在我们去看电影之前，我想去那里让他再次尝试我的鱼汤。
english: He teaches a course on food criticism at the New School, so before we go to the movies I wanna go by there and make him try my bouillabaisse again.

name: train_dia892_utt14
chinese: 哦，我迫不及待地想要读明天《邮报》的头版！
english: Oh, I cannot wait to read the front page of the Post tomorrow!

name: train_dia892_utt15
chinese: 餐厅评论员承认：我对莫妮卡的评价是错误的。
english: "Restaurant reviewer admits: I was wrong about Monica."

name: train_dia892_utt16
chinese: 前面的页面？你真的活在自己的小世界里，是吗？
english: The front page? You really do live in your own little world, don't ya?

name: train_dia893_utt0
chinese: 所以，你们找到人来为你们举办婚礼了吗？
english: So, did you uh, find anyone to marry you guys yet?

name: train_dia893_utt1
chinese: 不，但是莫妮卡部长打电话来，想知道我们是否还在一起。
english: No, but Horny for Monica Minister called, wanting to know if we were still together.

name: train_dia893_utt2
chinese: 我们永远找不到任何人。
english: We're never gonna find anybody.

name: train_dia893_utt3
chinese: 那好，让我来做吧！
english: Well then let me do it!

name: train_dia893_utt4
chinese: 乔
english: Joe

name: train_dia893_utt5
chinese: 不-不-不！
english: No-no-no!

name: train_dia893_utt6
chinese: 看，我一直在思考这个问题。
english: Look, I've been thinking about it.

name: train_dia893_utt7
chinese: 我是一个演员，对吗？
english: I'm an actor right?

name: train_dia893_utt8
chinese: 所以我不会在人前讲话时紧张。
english: So I won't get nervous talking in front of people.

name: train_dia893_utt9
chinese: 我不会吐痰，也不会盯着莫妮卡的胸部看！
english: I won't spit, and I won't stare at Monica's breasts!

name: train_dia893_utt10
chinese: 每个人都知道我是个喜欢屁股的人！
english: Everyone knows I'm an ass man!

name: train_dia893_utt11
chinese: 那是真的。
english: That is true.

name: train_dia893_utt12
chinese: 是的，最重要的是，那个人不会是一个陌生人，他几乎不了解你。
english: Yeah and the most important thing is that it won't be some like, stranger up there who barely knows you.

name: train_dia893_utt13
chinese: 这将是我！
english: It'll be me!

name: train_dia893_utt14
chinese: 我发誓我会做得非常好。
english: And I swear I'll do a really good job.

name: train_dia893_utt15
chinese: 嗯，你们知道的，我真的很爱你们，而且这对我来说意义非凡。
english: Plus, y'know I love you guys and-and it would really mean a lot to me.

name: train_dia893_utt16
chinese: 可能会很酷。
english: It might be kinda cool.

name: train_dia893_utt17
chinese: 那么我可以做吗？
english: So I can do it?

name: train_dia894_utt0
chinese: 啊哈！太自大了！
english: Ah-ha! Too cocky!

name: train_dia895_utt0
chinese: 我仍然无法相信他们拿走了我的钥匙。你相信我有你的钥匙。
english: I still can't believe they took away my key. You trust me with yours.

name: train_dia895_utt1
chinese: 当然！一旦他们在钥匙擦亮的地方处理完它，我就会把它还给你。
english: Of course I do! And I'm gonna give it back to you as soon as they're done with it at the key shining place.

name: train_dia895_utt2
chinese: 那是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is that?

name: train_dia895_utt3
chinese: 哇！哇！哇！特里格，你在做什么？
english: Whoa! Whoa! Whoa! Treeger, what are you doing?

name: train_dia895_utt4
chinese: 你说这里有一处煤气泄漏。
english: You said there was a gas leak in here.

name: train_dia895_utt5
chinese: 好吧，为什么你不用你的钥匙呢？
english: Well why don't you use your key?

name: train_dia895_utt6
chinese: 因为到我在这个东西上找到它的时候，整个地方可能已经爆炸了。
english: Because by the time I find it on this thing , the whole place might have exploded.

name: train_dia895_utt7
chinese: 如果这种情况发生在我管理的另一栋建筑物上，人们会开始提问。
english: If that happens at another building that I manage, people are gonna start asking questions.

name: train_dia895_utt8
chinese: 加油！
english: Come on!

name: train_dia895_utt9
chinese: 快点。
english: Hurry up.

name: train_dia895_utt10
chinese: 哦！我们本可以做到那个的。
english: Oh! We could have done that.

name: train_dia896_utt0
chinese: 幸运的是，她安顿下来的那个人听不到你在说什么。
english: Luckily, the guy she settled for can't hear what you're talking about.

name: train_dia896_utt1
chinese: 哦，非常抱歉。
english: Oh, I'm so sorry.

name: train_dia896_utt2
chinese: 嗯，也许我错了！
english: Um, and maybe I'm wrong!

name: train_dia896_utt3
chinese: 我但是你知道我会再和他出去，我会了解更多。
english: I but y'know I'm gonna go out with him again, I'll find out more.

name: train_dia896_utt4
chinese: 你相信这个人注定要和别人在一起，而你还打算和他约会吗？
english: You believe that this guy is destined for someone else and you're still gonna date him?

name: train_dia896_utt5
chinese: 嗯，他可能不是我的灵魂伴侣，但女孩子得吃饭。
english: Well, he may not be my soul mate, but a girl's gotta eat.

name: train_dia897_utt0
chinese: 哦，但这让她很开心。
english: Oh, but it's made her so happy.

name: train_dia897_utt1
chinese: 小女孩想念她的猫。
english: Little girl misses her cat.

name: train_dia897_utt2
chinese: 疯狂的女士认为她的母亲在一只猫里面。
english: Crazy lady thinks her mother is in a cat.

name: train_dia897_utt3
chinese: 好的，你知道吗，我得去和我儿子吃晚饭了，我能相信当你见到菲比时，你会告诉她吗？
english: Okay, y'know what, I have to go have dinner with my son, can I trust that when you see Phoebe, you will tell her.

name: train_dia897_utt4
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: train_dia897_utt5
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: train_dia897_utt6
chinese: 我
english: I

name: train_dia897_utt7
chinese: 他是对的，不是吗？
english: He is right, isn't he?

name: train_dia897_utt8
chinese: 你知道吗，我觉得这可能是他错的时候之一。
english: Y'know what, I think this might be one of the times he's wrong.

name: train_dia897_utt9
chinese: 你这么认为吗？
english: You think?

name: train_dia897_utt10
chinese: 哦，不，他是对的。
english: Oh-no, he's right.

name: train_dia898_utt0
chinese: 七百块钱！
english: Seven hundred bucks!

name: train_dia898_utt1
chinese: 好的，你做到了！我们有水果吗？
english: Alright, you did it! Do we have any fruit?

name: train_dia898_utt2
chinese: 伙计，这两个星期真是够糟糕的，是吧？但是，你知道吗？我真的觉得我学到了一些东西。
english: Man, hell of a two weeks, huh? Y'know what, though? I really feel like I learned something.

name: train_dia898_utt3
chinese: 真的吗？所以，你要坚持这个“这都是为了她”的事情吗？
english: Really? So, you're gonna stick with this 'it's all for her' thing?

name: train_dia898_utt4
chinese: 什么，你疯了吗？当一个盲人恢复视力时，他会像这样四处走动吗？
english: What, are you crazy? When a blind man gets his sight back, does he walk around like this?

name: train_dia899_utt0
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: train_dia899_utt1
chinese: 你知道在印度，这些是一种美味佳肴。
english: Y'know those are a delicacy in India.

name: train_dia900_utt0
chinese: 我也是。
english: Me too.

name: train_dia900_utt1
chinese: 尽管这个城市是我的家，但是。
english: Although this city is my home, so.

name: train_dia900_utt2
chinese: 所以我说的很愚蠢，请不要告诉他我说了那个。
english: So that's dumb what I said, don't tell him I said that.

name: train_dia900_utt3
chinese: 嗯，你编个故事吧。
english: Umm, you make something up.

name: train_dia900_utt4
chinese: 很好，谢谢你。
english: Nice,  thank you.

name: train_dia900_utt5
chinese: 这是我。
english: This is me.

name: train_dia900_utt6
chinese: 这里。
english: Here.

name: train_dia900_utt7
chinese: 你的眼睛非常漂亮。
english: Your eyes are very pretty.

name: train_dia900_utt8
chinese: 非常感谢你！哦！谢谢你！
english: Thank you, very much! Oh!  Thank you!

name: train_dia900_utt9
chinese: 他想要亲吻你。
english: He would like to kiss you.

name: train_dia900_utt10
chinese: 好的，你知道吗，你现在不必这样做。
english: Okay, y'know what, you don't have to do that now.

name: train_dia900_utt11
chinese: 不-不-不-不！！
english: No-no-no-no!!

name: train_dia900_utt12
chinese: 不是他，你不要！
english: Not him, you don't!

name: train_dia900_utt13
chinese: 好了，这一刻已经过去了。
english: Well the moment's over.

name: train_dia900_utt14
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: train_dia900_utt15
chinese: 嗨！
english: Oy!

name: train_dia901_utt0
chinese: 嘿！等一下，等一秒。你觉得这些珍珠漂亮吗？
english: Hey! Hold on a minute, hold on a second. Do you think these pearls are nice?

name: train_dia901_utt1
chinese: 我真的更喜欢一辆山地自行车。
english: I'd really prefer a mountain bike.

name: train_dia901_utt2
chinese: 珍妮丝的生日快要到了，我想给她买一些特别的东西。跟我一起进来吧。
english: Janice's birthday is coming up, I want to get her something speacial. Come in here with me.

name: train_dia901_utt3
chinese: 哇，哇，哇，等等，哇。
english: Whoa, whoa, whoa, wait, whoa.

name: train_dia901_utt4
chinese: 你啊，想给她买点特别的东西吗？给她买花，给她买糖果，给她买口香糖，女孩子喜欢口香糖。
english: Do you ah, want to get her something speacial, get her flowers, get her candy, get her gum, girls love gum.

name: train_dia901_utt5
chinese: 那是个好主意，亲爱的珍妮丝，祝你生日快乐。我想给她买点严肃的东西。
english: That's a good idea, Dear Janice have a Hubba-Bubba birthday'. I would like to get her something serious.

name: train_dia901_utt6
chinese: 哦，你想要一些认真的事情。
english: Oh, you want something serious.

name: train_dia901_utt7
chinese: 你知道你应该做什么吗？你应该给她做一个那种钡灌肠。
english: Y'know what you should do, you should get her one of those um, barium enemas.

name: train_dia901_utt8
chinese: 那些是非常严肃的。
english: Those are dead serious.

name: train_dia901_utt9
chinese: 好的。听着，我要进去这里，你永远不要给我买任何东西。
english: All right. Look, I'm gonna go in here, and you don't buy me anything ever.

name: train_dia901_utt10
chinese: 不，不，你不能，你不能，好吧，你不能，你不能买她的珍珠，你就是不能，你不能，你不能。

english: No, you can't! Friends hooking up is a bad idea.

name: train_dia932_utt6
chinese: 请问，你和钱德勒怎么样了？
english: Please, what about you and Chandler?

name: train_dia932_utt7
chinese: 那不一样！我当时喝醉了，很愚蠢！
english: That's different! I was drunk and stupid!

name: train_dia932_utt8
chinese: 嗨，你好！
english: Well hello !

name: train_dia932_utt9
chinese: 关于你从他们那里得到电话号码的那些男人呢？为什么你不亲吻其中一个呢？
english: What about all the guys that you've got the phone numbers from?    Why don't you just kiss one of them?

name: train_dia932_utt10
chinese: 我可以，我可以，但我不想！我想亲吻乔伊！
english: I could, I could but I don't want to! I want to kiss Joey!

name: train_dia932_utt11
chinese: 好吧。我认为这是一个大错误，但这是你的决定。
english: Alright . I think it's a big mistake but it's your decision.

name: train_dia932_utt12
chinese: 我要去做。
english: I'm gonna do it.

name: train_dia932_utt13
chinese: 而我无法阻止你。
english: And I can't stop you.

name: train_dia932_utt14
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: train_dia932_utt15
chinese: 嘿，瑞秋，你看到查理在哪里吗？
english: Hey Rach, have you seen Charlie anywhere?

name: train_dia932_utt16
chinese: 我比你聪明
english: I'm smarter than

name: train_dia933_utt0
chinese: 哦，嘿，冈瑟，看看这个。
english: Oh, hey, Gunther, check this out.

name: train_dia933_utt1
chinese: 是的，那个Chandler让我笑翻了。
english: Yeah, that-that Chandler cracks me up.

name: train_dia933_utt2
chinese: 嘿，罗斯，听着，你想喝点什么吗？因为我正要去那边。
english: Hey Ross, listen, you want anything to drink, cause I'm heading up there.

name: train_dia933_utt3
chinese: 嗯，是的，我要一杯咖啡。谢谢，伙计。
english: Uh, yeah, I'll take a coffee. Thanks, man.

name: train_dia933_utt4
chinese: 当然。咖啡吗？因为我要去那边。
english: Sure.  Coffee? Cause I'm going up there.

name: train_dia933_utt5
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: train_dia933_utt6
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No, thank you.

name: train_dia933_utt7
chinese: 你们需要什么吗，因为我正要去那里。
english: You guys need anything, cause I'm heading up there.

name: train_dia933_utt8
chinese: 我想要一杯冰水。
english: I'd love an ice water.

name: train_dia933_utt9
chinese: 你明白了。
english: You got it.

name: train_dia933_utt10
chinese: 乔伊，你在做什么？
english: Joey, what are you doing?

name: train_dia933_utt11
chinese: 只是友好的。
english: Just being friendly.

name: train_dia933_utt12
chinese: 乔伊，亲爱的，我觉得你不应该回去那里。
english: Joey, honey, I don't think you're supposed to go back there.

name: train_dia933_utt13
chinese: 没关系，对吧，冈瑟？
english: Nah, it's okay. Right, Gunther?

name: train_dia933_utt14
chinese: 不要对我眨眼。并且穿上你的围裙。
english: Don't wink at me. And put on your apron.

name: train_dia933_utt15
chinese: 好的，但是我没有看到你要求其他付费顾客穿上围裙。
english: Okay, but I don't see you asking any other paying customers to put on aprons.

name: train_dia933_utt16
chinese: 乔伊，你在这里工作吗？
english: Joey, do you work here?

name: train_dia933_utt17
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: train_dia933_utt18
chinese: 嘿，服务员。
english: Hey, waiter.

name: train_dia933_utt19
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: train_dia934_utt0
chinese: 你已经联系到莫妮卡和钱德勒的电话，如果你正在收听这条留言，我们可能正在筛选。是的，我们正在筛选。
english: You've reached Monica and Chandler's, if you're listening to this message, we're probably screening.  Yeah we are.

name: train_dia934_utt1
chinese: 嗨，我是摩根大通博物馆的海尔迪。
english: Hi, this is Heldi from the Morgan Chase museum.

name: train_dia934_utt2
chinese: 我打电话给莫妮卡·盖勒。
english: I'm calling for Monica Geller.

name: train_dia934_utt3
chinese: 我想让她知道有一个取消，并且如果她仍然有兴趣在我们的场地举办Bing-Geller婚礼，那是可行的。
english: I want to let her know that there was a cancellation and if she's still interested in having the Bing-Geller wedding at our facility, it is available

name: train_dia934_utt4
chinese: 这是钱德勒·宾！这是钱德勒·宾！是的，新郎！不！不是新郎！！
english: This is Chandler Bing! This is Chandler Bing!  Yes, the groom No! Not the groom!!

name: train_dia935_utt0
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: train_dia935_utt1
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: train_dia935_utt2
chinese: 我简直不敢相信！这就像是有史以来最糟糕的夜晚！
english: I can't believe this! This is like the worst night ever!

name: train_dia935_utt3
chinese: 你知道的，莫妮卡，你和钱德勒的关系有一点小挫折。没什么大不了的！他只是钱德勒而已。我是
english: Y'know Monica you had a minor setback in your relationship with Chandler. Big deal! It's only Chandler.  I am

name: train_dia935_utt4
chinese: 这太疯狂了！我的意思是，这个争论太愚蠢了。我甚至不想再见到Richard。
english: This is crazy! I mean, it's such a stupid argument. I don't even wanna see Richard again.

name: train_dia935_utt5
chinese: 那就去修理它！
english: So go fix it!

name: train_dia935_utt6
chinese: 去找钱德勒！
english: Go find Chandler!

name: train_dia935_utt7
chinese: 他可能在你的房间里！
english: He's probably up in your room!

name: train_dia935_utt8
chinese: 告诉他你很抱歉，并且你爱他。
english: Tell him that you're sorry and that you love him.

name: train_dia935_utt9
chinese: 你知道吗？你是对的，菲比。你是对的。谢谢你！
english: Y'know what? You're right Phoebe. You're right. Thank you!

name: train_dia935_utt10
chinese: 当然！是的！拉斯维加斯，第一！
english: Sure!   Yeah! Las Vegas, number one!

name: train_dia935_utt11
chinese: 有人丢了这个吗？
english: Anybody lose this?

name: train_dia935_utt12
chinese: 出来了。下注吧。骰子出来了。加倍或者不要！付给前线！
english: Comin' out. Place your bet.  Dice are out.  Double or nothin'! Pay the front line!

name: train_dia935_utt13
chinese: 嗯。
english: Hmm.

name: train_dia936_utt0
chinese: 你还记得鸭子食物在哪里吗？
english: Do you remember where the duck food is?

name: train_dia936_utt1
chinese: 是的，它在男孩们的公寓洗手池下面。为什么？
english: Yeah, it's in the guys' apartment under the sink. Why?

name: train_dia936_utt2
chinese: 因为我要去伦敦。
english: Because I'm going to London.

name: train_dia936_utt3
chinese: 什么？你是什么意思，你要去伦敦？
english: What?! What do you mean you're going to London?

name: train_dia936_utt4
chinese: 是的，我必须告诉罗斯我爱他。
english: Yeah, I have to tell Ross that I love him.

name: train_dia936_utt5
chinese: 亲爱的，你要注意好，等我回来之前不要生那些孩子。
english: Now honey, you take care, you don't have those babies until I get back.

name: train_dia936_utt6
chinese: 我，Rachel，你不能走！Ross爱Emily！
english: I Rachel, you can't go! Ross loves Emily!

name: train_dia936_utt7
chinese: 是的，我知道，我知道，我知道他这样做。
english: Yeah, I know, I know, I know he does.

name: train_dia936_utt8
chinese: 但是我必须告诉他我感受如何！
english: But I have to tell him how I feel!

name: train_dia936_utt9
chinese: 他应该拥有所有的信息，然后他可以做出明智的决定。
english: He deserves to have all the information and then he can make an informed decision.

name: train_dia936_utt10
chinese: 那不是你去的原因！
english: That's not why you're going!

name: train_dia936_utt11
chinese: 你去是因为你希望他会说：“是的，我也爱你，Rach。”
english: You're going because you hope he's gonna say, "Yeah, I love you too, Rach.

name: train_dia936_utt12
chinese: 忘记那个英国的炸鱼薯条店。
english: Forget that British chippy."

name: train_dia936_utt13
chinese: 哦，你认为他会吗？
english: Ohh Do you think he will?!

name: train_dia936_utt14
chinese: 不！
english: No!

name: train_dia936_utt15
chinese: 因为他爱上了英国的炸鱼薯条摊！
english: Because he's in love with the British chippy!

name: train_dia936_utt16
chinese: 看着，瑞秋，如果你去的话，你只会搞乱他的思绪，毁了他的婚礼！
english: Look, Rachel, if you go, you're just gonna mess with his head and ruin his wedding!

name: train_dia936_utt17
chinese: 你知道的，现在太晚了！
english: Y'know, it's too late!

name: train_dia936_utt18
chinese: 你错过了你的机会！
english: You missed you're chance!

name: train_dia936_utt19
chinese: 对不起，我知道这一定很难，我们结束了。
english: I'm sorry, I know this must be really hard, it's over.

name: train_dia936_utt20
chinese: 你知道吗？不，直到有人说：“我愿意”才算结束。
english: Y'know what? No. It's not over until someone says, "I do."

name: train_dia936_utt21
chinese: 我愿意！我愿意！我愿意！我愿意！哎呀，就像我真的能追得上你一样。我正在背着一堆东西。
english: I do! I do! I do!  I do!  Ugh, like I can really chase you. I'm carrying a litter.

name: train_dia937_utt0
chinese: 大家都在这里吗？
english: So is everybody here?

name: train_dia937_utt1
chinese: 我自己稍微早到了这里。
english: I got here a little early myself.

name: train_dia937_utt2
chinese: 让我们开始。
english: Let us begin.

name: train_dia937_utt3
chinese: 现在，水龙兽已经在两个主要地点被发掘出来。
english: Now, the hydrosaurids have been unearthed in two main locations.

name: train_dia937_utt4
chinese: 这里。
english: Here.

name: train_dia937_utt5
chinese: 这里。
english: Here.

name: train_dia937_utt6
chinese: 现在关于水龙兽
english: Now as for the hydrosaurs

name: train_dia938_utt0
chinese: 嗯，总之贝丝，我想说的是在那天晚上跟你回家之前，我应该考虑到你的感受。
english: Well, so anyway Beth, what I'm saying is I should've considered your feelings before I went home with you that night.

name: train_dia938_utt1
chinese: 我啊，最近才学会了你那边的感受，我很抱歉。
english: I've ah, I've recently learned what's it like to be on your side of it, and I'm sorry.

name: train_dia938_utt2
chinese: 那么，你认为你能原谅我吗？
english: So, do you think you can forgive me?

name: train_dia938_utt3
chinese: 很好。
english: Great.

name: train_dia938_utt4
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: train_dia938_utt5
chinese: 好的，再见。
english: Okay, bye.

name: train_dia938_utt6
chinese: 你好，詹妮弗？
english: Hello, Jennifer?

name: train_dia938_utt7
chinese: 嗨，洛里夫人，珍妮弗在吗？
english: Oh hi, Mrs. Loreo, is Jennifer there?

name: train_dia938_utt8
chinese: 哦，她不在家，是吗？
english: Oh, she's not home huh?

name: train_dia938_utt9
chinese: 嗯，实际上，我也有点需要和你谈谈。
english: Well ah, actually I kinda need to talk to you too.

name: train_dia939_utt0
chinese: 嘿！
english: Hey!

name: train_dia939_utt1
chinese: 嗨。
english: Hi.

name: train_dia939_utt2
chinese: 你还好吗？
english: Are you all right?

name: train_dia939_utt3
chinese: 嗯...我想我刚刚订婚了。
english: Uhh… I think I just got engaged.

name: train_dia939_utt4
chinese: 哦，我的天！他做到了吗？
english: Oh my God! He did it?

name: train_dia939_utt5
chinese: 嗯...你知道他会问我吗？
english: Well…did you know he was gonna ask me?

name: train_dia939_utt6
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？
english: Are you kidding?

name: train_dia939_utt7
chinese: 我就像是那个说服他的人。
english: I’m like the one who talked him into it.

name: train_dia939_utt8
chinese: 我喜欢把自己看作是团队的操纵者。
english: I  like to think of myself as the puppet master of the group.

name: train_dia939_utt9
chinese: 你真的认为这是个好主意吗？
english: And you really think this is a good idea?

name: train_dia939_utt10
chinese: 我刚刚说服他这样做，别告诉我我还得说服你。傀儡师累了。
english: I just talked him into it, don’t tell me I have to do you too.  The puppet master gets tired people.

name: train_dia939_utt11
chinese: 我真的不知道！这感觉就不对。
english: I just don’t know! It just doesn’t feel right.

name: train_dia939_utt12
chinese: 为什么？！你们两个是如此注定要在一起的，每个人都这么认为。
english: Why?! You two are so meant to be together, everybody thinks  so.

name: train_dia939_utt13
chinese: 真的吗？连罗斯也？
english: Really?! Even Ross?

name: train_dia939_utt14
chinese: 特别是罗斯！
english: Especially Ross!

name: train_dia939_utt15
chinese: 哦，嗯，嘿菲比。嗯，你知道吗？我会稍后回来的。
english: Oh uh, hey Pheebs. Uh y’know what? I’ll-I’ll come  back later.

name: train_dia939_utt16
chinese: 哇！这里有点儿拥挤，我猜我会回来的。
english: Wow! Kind of uh, kind of a full house here. I’ll guess just…I’ll  come back.

name: train_dia939_utt17
chinese: 他走了，你的未婚夫。
english: There he goes, your fiancée.

name: train_dia939_utt18
chinese: 我猜是这样的。
english: I guess so.

name: train_dia939_utt19
chinese: 虽然他在睡觉时会自慰。
english: Although he does play with himself in his sleep.

name: train_dia939_utt20
chinese: 我不能说我感到惊讶。
english: I can’t say that I’m surprised.

name: train_dia940_utt0
chinese: 哦，那真是太不幸了。
english: Oh, that is so unfortunate.

name: train_dia940_utt1
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia940_utt2
chinese: 可爱的裸男真的开始发胖了。
english: Cute naked guy is really starting to put on weight.

name: train_dia940_utt3
chinese: 好的，我马上就回来。噢，菲比，对不起我在电话上留下了口红印记。
english: Okay, I'll be back in just a minute. Oh, Phoebe I'm sorry that I left lipstick marks on the phone.

name: train_dia940_utt4
chinese: 你没有在电话上留下口红印记。
english: You didn't leave lipstick marks on the phone.

name: train_dia940_utt5
chinese: 哦，那么一定是你了。再见。
english: Oh, then it must've been you. Bye.

name: train_dia940_utt6
chinese: 再见！这就是我搬出去的原因。
english: Bye-bye!  That's why I moved out.

name: train_dia940_utt7
chinese: 嘿，你知道吗，既然我们谈到这个了，你什么时候告诉我妹妹你不再住在这里了。
english: Hey, y'know while we're on that, when are you gonna tell my sister that you don't live here anymore.

name: train_dia940_utt8
chinese: 我认为在某些层面上她已经知道。
english: I think on some levels she already knows.

name: train_dia941_utt0
chinese: 晚上，星期一晚上，胡里奥。
english: Night Mon. Night Julio.

name: train_dia941_utt1
chinese: 再见。
english: Adiós.

name: train_dia941_utt2
chinese: 朱利奥，有人把他们的书留在这里了。
english: Look Julio, someone left their book here.

name: train_dia941_utt3
chinese: 啊，实际上，那是我的。
english: Ah actually, that is mine.

name: train_dia941_utt4
chinese: 哦，是啊，你在读什么？
english: Oh yeah, what are you reading?

name: train_dia941_utt5
chinese: 《恶之花》，由波德莱尔所著。你读过吗？
english: Flowers of Evil, by Beaudalire. Have you read it?

name: train_dia941_utt6
chinese: 我读过它吗？不，你喜欢它吗？
english: Have I read it?  No, are you enjoying it?

name: train_dia941_utt7
chinese: 我本以为会的，但翻译不好。
english: I thought I would, but the translation's no good.

name: train_dia941_utt8
chinese: 你是个诗人，却不自知。
english: Your a poet and don't know it.

name: train_dia941_utt9
chinese: 实际上，我啊，我是一位诗人。
english: Actually I ah, I am a poet.

name: train_dia941_utt10
chinese: 哦，那你知道了。那么，你写些什么样的东西呢？
english: Oh, then you do know it.  So um what kind of things do you write about?

name: train_dia941_utt11
chinese: 让我感动的事物。树的影子，一个笑着的孩子，或者这双嘴唇。
english: Things that move me. The, the shadow of a tree, a child laughing, or this lip.

name: train_dia941_utt12
chinese: 我的？就在这里吗？
english: Mine?  Right here?

name: train_dia941_utt13
chinese: 我可以写一首关于这双唇的史诗诗歌。
english: I can write an epic poem about this lip.

name: train_dia941_utt14
chinese: 那会怎样呢？嗯，它没有押韵，但我喜欢它。
english: How would that go?  Well, it didn't rhyme, but I liked it.

name: train_dia942_utt0
chinese: 最后一站，蒙特利尔。这一站是蒙特利尔。
english: Last stop, Montreal. This stop is Montreal.

name: train_dia942_utt1
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia942_utt2
chinese: 我和自己打赌，说你有一双美丽的眼睛。现在我看到了，我赢了。
english: I made a bet with myself that you have beautiful eyes. Now that I see them, I win.

name: train_dia942_utt3
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia942_utt4
chinese: 我们到了我的站点。但是你想喝咖啡吗？
english: We're at my stop. But would you like to have coffee?

name: train_dia942_utt5
chinese: 我们真的在蒙特利尔吗？
english: Are we really in Montreal?!

name: train_dia942_utt6
chinese: 是的，我们是。那么，喝咖啡吗？
english: Yes we are. So, coffee?

name: train_dia942_utt7
chinese: 咖啡听起来很棒。等等，那么你住在蒙特利尔吗？
english: Coffee sounds great.  Wait, so, so you live in Montreal?

name: train_dia942_utt8
chinese: 哦，不。但只需要坐两个小时的渡轮就能到达新斯科舍。
english: Oh, no. But it's just a two hour ferry ride to Nova Scotia.

name: train_dia943_utt0
chinese: 好的，这是第22批。
english: Okay, here's batch 22.

name: train_dia943_utt1
chinese: 哦，也许这些会有点像你奶奶的味道。
english: Oh, maybe these'll taste a little like your grandmother's.

name: train_dia943_utt2
chinese: 这有一点橙皮，但没有肉豆蔻。
english: This has a little bit of orange peel, but no nutmeg.

name: train_dia943_utt3
chinese: 让我们试试看。
english: Let's give it a shot.

name: train_dia943_utt4
chinese: 哦，那是为了什么？像是一个烘焙义卖吗？
english: Oh, what was that for? Like a bake sale?

name: train_dia943_utt5
chinese: 不，只是一个星期五晚上。
english: No, just a Friday night.

name: train_dia944_utt0
chinese: 她会吗？
english: Would she?

name: train_dia944_utt1
chinese: 她会吗？你吃了我的糖果棒！
english: Would she?  You ate my candy bar!

name: train_dia945_utt0
chinese: 哦，天哪，我讨厌我的工作，我讨厌它，我讨厌我的工作，我讨厌它。
english: Oh God, I hate my job, I hate it, I hate my job, I hate it.

name: train_dia945_utt1
chinese: 我知道亲爱的，对不起。
english: I know honey, I'm sorry.

name: train_dia945_utt2
chinese: 哦，我想要辞职，但是然后我想我应该坚持下去，然后我想为什么这样的人会留在这样一份有失尊严的工作中，仅仅因为它与他们感兴趣的领域有些关联。
english: Oh, I wanna quit, but then I think I should stick it out, then I think why would such a person stay in such a demeaning job, just because it's remotely related to the field they're interested in.

name: train_dia945_utt3
chinese: 嘿，我不知道，拉奇。来点菜！我有一份耶特尔汤，一份詹姆斯豆，还有一份哈迪不要多余的东西！
english: Gee, I don't know Rach. Order up!! I got a Yentel soup, a James Beans, and a Howdy hold the Dowdy!

name: train_dia945_utt4
chinese: 哦亲爱的，别这样，对不起，我没有...

name: train_dia945_utt5
chinese: 我不介意付出代价，你知道的，只是我通过陪同关节炎的裁缝米拉去洗手间能学到多少关于时尚的知识。
english: I don't mind paying my dues, y'know, its just how much am I gonna learn about fashion by walking Mira, the arthritic seamstress, to the bathroom.

name: train_dia945_utt6
chinese: 嗨！你觉得我的痛苦有趣吗？
english: Hi! Is my misery amusing to you?

name: train_dia945_utt7
chinese: 对不起，我，我，我只是啊...

name: train_dia945_utt8

name: train_dia945_utt9
chinese: 哦相信我，我-我-我去过那里。我曾经在那个Mannequins Plus整理模特儿的头部。

name: train_dia945_utt10
chinese: 哦，那么我就回去和我的朋友聊天了。

chinese: 然后你可以回去享受你的小汉堡了。

chinese: 啊，还有一件事。

chinese: 是的？！

name: train_dia945_utt14
chinese: 我啊，我在工作。

name: train_dia946_utt3

name: train_dia946_utt4

name: train_dia946_utt5

name: train_dia946_utt6

name: train_dia947_utt0

name: train_dia947_utt3

name: train_dia947_utt4

name: train_dia947_utt5

name: train_dia947_utt6

name: train_dia947_utt10
chinese: 好的，继续。

name: train_dia947_utt11
chinese: 嗯，嗯，它们两个都是以蛋黄和黄油为基础，但是贝尔纳兹酱中有葱、醋和最重要的是龙蒿。
english: Well umm, they both have a egg yolk and butter base, but a bearnaise has shallots, shirvel, and most importantly tarragon.

chinese: 莫妮卡。

name: train_dia947_utt15

name: train_dia1007_utt9
chinese: 你知道吗，Rach，也许你应该就在咖啡馆待着。
english: Y'know what Rach, maybe you should just, y'know stay here at the coffee house.

name: train_dia1007_utt10
chinese: 我不能！
english: I can't!

name: train_dia1007_utt11
chinese: 太晚了！
english: It's too late!

name: train_dia1007_utt12
chinese: 特里已经雇了那个女孩在那边。
english: Terry already hired that girl over there.

name: train_dia1007_utt13
chinese: 看她，她甚至有服务员的经验。
english: Look at her, she's even got waitress experience.

name: train_dia1007_utt14
chinese: 昨晚她在教大家如何折餐巾纸成天鹅。
english: Last night she was teaching everybody how to make napkin....  swans.

name: train_dia1007_utt15
chinese: 那个词是天鹅。
english: That word was swans.

name: train_dia1008_utt0
chinese: 我们那里有什么？
english: What do we got there?

name: train_dia1008_utt1
chinese: 一件东西：拳击短裤，贺卡，还有一张看起来像是半烧焦的照片。哇，那个家伙比首席更毛茸茸的！
english: A piece of something: boxer shorts, greeting cards, and what looks like a half-charred picture Wow, that guy's hairier than the Chief!

name: train_dia1008_utt2
chinese: 你知道吗，这是一个非常有趣的故事，关于这是如何发生的。
english: You know, it's a really funny story how this happened.

name: train_dia1008_utt3
chinese: 没关系。
english: It's all right.

name: train_dia1008_utt4
chinese: 没关系。
english: It's all right.

name: train_dia1008_utt5
chinese: 你不必解释。
english: You don't have to explain.

name: train_dia1008_utt6
chinese: 这不是我们见过的第一次男朋友篝火失控。
english: This isn't the first boyfriend bonfire that we've seen get out of control.

name: train_dia1008_utt7
chinese: 你是我们今晚的第三个电话。
english: You're our third call tonight.

name: train_dia1008_utt8
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: train_dia1008_utt9
chinese: 哦，当然，情人节是我们一年中最忙碌的夜晚。
english: Oh, sure, Valentine's is our busiest night of the year.

name: train_dia1009_utt0
chinese: 对不起，你们。我不是故意让你们失望的。
english: I'm so sorry, you guys. I didn't mean to bring you down.

name: train_dia1009_utt1
chinese: 不，你是对的。我没有计划。
english: No, you were right. I don't have a plan.

name: train_dia1009_utt2
chinese: 谢谢上帝。食物。
english: Thank God. Food.

name: train_dia1009_utt3
chinese: 菲比？
english: Phoebe?

name: train_dia1009_utt4
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: train_dia1009_utt5
chinese: 你有计划吗？
english: Do you have a plan?

name: train_dia1009_utt6
chinese: 我甚至没有一个“pl”。
english: I don't even have a 'pl'.

name: train_dia1009_utt7
chinese: 不，不，这不是我们订购的东西...我们订购的是无脂皮带额外的奶酪。
english: No, no, that's not what we ordered... We ordered a fat-free crust with extra cheese.

name: train_dia1009_utt8
chinese: 等一下！你说的是'G.Stephanopoulos'吗？
english: Wait! Did you say 'G.Stephanopoulos?'

name: train_dia1009_utt9
chinese: 等等，这是一个有着奇特聪明外貌的地中海小个子吗？
english: Wait, was this a-a small mediterranean guy with curiously intelligent good looks?

name: train_dia1009_utt10
chinese: 他穿着一套令人惊艳的蓝色西装吗？
english: Was he wearing a stunning blue suit?

name: train_dia1009_utt11
chinese: 还有一条领带吗？
english: And-and a power tie?

name: train_dia1009_utt12
chinese: 哦，天啊。
english: Oh God.

name: train_dia1009_utt13
chinese: 你疯了吗？！我们有乔治·斯蒂芬诺普洛斯的披萨！
english: Are you nuts?! We've got George Stephanopoulos' pizza!

name: train_dia1009_utt14
chinese: 嗯，菲比？乔治·斯纳弗洛普格斯是谁？
english: Uh, Pheebs? Who's George Snuffalopagus?

name: train_dia1009_utt15
chinese: 大鸟的朋友。
english: Big Bird's friend.

name: train_dia1009_utt16
chinese: 我看到披萨！
english: I see pizza!

name: train_dia1009_utt17
chinese: 哦，我想看！让我看！让我看！
english: Oh, I wanna see! Lemme see! Lemme see!

name: train_dia1009_utt18
chinese: 你好？我们在监视谁？
english: Hello? Who are we spying on?

name: train_dia1010_utt0
chinese: 嘿，你知道一个非常适合在雨天玩的游戏吗？
english: Hey, y'know what a really good rainy day game is?

name: train_dia1010_utt1
chinese: 什么？！
english: What?!

name: train_dia1010_utt2
chinese: 我是说裸体游戏。脱衣扑克，我们应该完全玩脱衣扑克。
english: I mean naked game. Strip poker, we should totally play strip poker.

name: train_dia1010_utt3
chinese: 不，不！
english: No, no!

name: train_dia1010_utt4
chinese: 你疯了吗？！
english: What are you crazy?!

name: train_dia1010_utt5
chinese: 加油！当你离开时，你必须玩耍，这就像一条法律！
english: Come on! When you go away, you-you have to play, it's like a law!

name: train_dia1010_utt6
chinese: 全部完成！
english: Allll done!

name: train_dia1010_utt7
chinese: 哎呀，谢谢你。
english: Aww, thank you.

english: Okay, who's next?!

name: train_dia1010_utt9
chinese: 不-不-不！没门！
english: No-o-o!  No way!

chinese: 是的，好吧，如果啊，如果这个周末是规定的话...不！
english: Yeah well, if ah, if that's the rule this weekend...  No!

chinese: 太美了！就像是有史以来第一个浴室地板一样。哇！你要去那里干什么？
english: It's beautiful! It's like the first bathroom floor there ever was.  Whoa! Are you going in there for?

name: train_dia1011_utt1
chinese: 什么，像一个数字吗？
english: What, like a number?

name: train_dia1011_utt5
chinese: 好了，是时候了。
english: Well, it's about time.

name: train_dia1011_utt6
chinese: 哦，非常正式。
english: Ooh, very official.

name: train_dia1011_utt7
chinese: 哦，是的，嗯，你知道的，钱德勒在他的电脑上打印出来了。
english: Oh, yeah, well y'know Chandler printed it up on his computer.

name: train_dia1011_utt8
chinese: 谁把它覆膜了？
english: And who laminated it?

chinese: 那就是我。
english: That would be me.

name: train_dia1011_utt10
chinese: 好的，让我看看。乌玛·瑟曼，薇诺娜·莱德，伊丽莎白·赫利，米歇尔·菲佛和多萝西·哈梅尔？

chinese: 嘿，这是我的清单。

english: Okay honey, you do realize she only spins like that on ice.

chinese: 好的，菲比，这是奥伯曼医生。他对方齐或其他人没有强烈的感觉。

english: Umm, I'm actually a first year resident, but I get that a lot, you see, I-I graduated early

english: Uh-huh, me too. Ross, maybe I should've specified that I'd be needing a grown up doctor.

name: train_dia1012_utt4
chinese: 哦不，我完全有资格
english: Oh no, I'm fully qualified to

chinese: 嘘！
english: Shh!

name: train_dia1012_utt6
chinese: 嘟嘟，嘘！
english: Doogie, shh!

chinese: 难道没有人明白我很快就要生孩子了吗？
english: Doesn't anybody understand that I'm gonna be having babies soon?

name: train_dia1012_utt8
chinese: 嗯？

chinese: 去！
english: Go!

chinese: 去吧，小男孩，去吧！
english: Go little boy, go!

chinese: 哦，太酷了！你让他哭了！

chinese: 嘿，外面有一些人，他们在问糖果的事。
english: Hey, there's uh, some people outside, askin' about candy.

chinese: 好吧，他们只能等待了，不是吗？我只有两只手！！
english: Well, they're just gonna have to wait aren't they? I've only got two hands!!

chinese: 需要帮助吗？
english: Need some help?

chinese: 不！你不了解这个系统！不会有人来搞乱这个系统！
english: No! You don't know the system! There'll be nobody messing with the system!

chinese: 请出示您的驾驶证。

english: You don't-you don't want to hear about my dream OfficerPretty?

english: It's Petty.  I'll be right back with your ticket.

chinese: 你有一个儿子！
english: You have a son!

name: train_dia1014_utt4
chinese: 我知道。我知道。
english: I know. I know.

english: Uh, like, could these margaritas

english: Loved your Stevie Wonder last night.

name: train_dia1015_utt3
chinese: 谢谢。听着，关于每周的数字，我需要它们放在我的桌子上。
english: Thanks. Listen, about the weekly numbers, I'm gonna need them on my desk

name: train_dia1015_utt4
chinese: 当然。
english: Sure.

name: train_dia1015_utt5
chinese: 没问题。
english: No problem.

name: train_dia1015_utt6
chinese: 你必须给他们一些东西，你知道的。
english: You have to give 'em something, you know.

name: train_dia1015_utt7
chinese: 好的，现在是Gerston，Santos，还有那个留胡子的人是谁？
english: Okay, now that was Gerston, Santos, and who's the guy with the moustache?

chinese: 宠物里。

name: train_dia1015_utt9
chinese: 宠物瑞特，对的，对的。好的，有些人将会工作。
english: Petrie, right, right. Okay, some people gonna be working

name: train_dia1016_utt0
chinese: 对吗？

name: train_dia1016_utt1
chinese: 对吗？
english: Right?

name: train_dia1016_utt2
chinese: 我的意思是，这真的难以置信，你知道的，他们就这样起飞了，甚至没有回头看一眼。
english: I mean it's pretty unbelievable y'know, I mean they just took off, took off without even looking back.

chinese: 你知道吗，我不需要他们，嗯，我现在有你们作为朋友，你和苏珊。
english: Y'know I don't, I don't need them, huh, I've got you guys now as friends, you and Susan.

name: train_dia1016_utt4
chinese: 啊，苏珊会很高兴的。

english: 717?  Where's 717?  Hey, you've have more of these for Susan right?

english: No. But it's okay, I'll just put out pickles or something.

english: I ate a bug.

english: Hey Rach, the tampons here are only a penny. Let's stock up.

english: Listen Ross, we ran out of gas, and we don't know where we are, so we can't get a tow truck.

english: Well, oh, I'm sorry your car broke down Pheebs, but I'm a little too busy with some of my real friends right now, but please call to let me know you got home safely okay?

name: train_dia1016_utt15
chinese: 菲比，等一下。拿着我的车，去接你的朋友们。
english: Phoebe, hang on a second.  Here, take my car, go pick up your friends.

name: train_dia1016_utt16
chinese: 不，我不会去捡起它们。
english: No, I'm not gonna pick them up.

name: train_dia1016_utt17
chinese: 听着，我们都知道你会这么做，因为你不是个混蛋。
english: Listen, we both know you're gonna do it cause you're not a jerk.

name: train_dia1016_utt18
chinese: 所以你可以在这里闷闷不乐半个小时然后去接他们，或者节省我们双方的时间，在车里闷闷不乐。
english: So you can either sulk here for a half hour and then go pick them up, or save us both time and sulk in the car.

name: train_dia1016_utt19
chinese: 不，Rachel不想让我...
english: No, Rachel doesn't want me to....

name: train_dia1016_utt20
chinese: 看，我，我，我很抱歉Rachel因为爱上了那个Mark而抛弃了你，你是这一切中的无辜受害者，但不要因为Rachel对你所做的事情而惩罚你的朋友。
english: Look, I-I-I am sorry that Rachel dumped you cause she fell in love with that Mark guy, and you are the innocent victim in all of this, but don't punish your friends for what Rachel did to you.

name: train_dia1016_utt21
chinese: 是的，你说得对。
english: Yeah, you're right.

english: God, I feel so guilty about Ross.

name: train_dia1017_utt1
chinese: 哦，我知道。
english: Oh, I know.

name: train_dia1017_utt2
chinese: 我有点觉得这是我的错。
english: I kinda feel like it's my fault.

name: train_dia1017_utt3
chinese: 有点吗？如果你把这个事情只是自己留着，就不会发生这一切。
english: Kind of? If you just kept this to yourself none of this would've happened.

name: train_dia1017_utt4
chinese: 嗯，这些日子我一直把很多事情都藏在心里，肯定会有一些东西不小心说出来的！
english: Well, I'm keeping so many things to myself these days, something was bound to slip out!

name: train_dia1017_utt5
chinese: 嗯，我认为你说的话很勇敢。
english: Well, I think it's very brave what you said.

name: train_dia1017_utt6
chinese: 好的，我不能再坐在这里了。我得走一走。
english: All right, I can't sit here anymore. I have to walk places.

english: Pheebs, what are you doing with the coat? How about the whole animal rights thing?

english: Well, I've been reading up and for your information, minks are not very nice.

name: train_dia1017_utt9

name: train_dia1017_utt10
chinese: 我喜欢这件外套！
english: I love this coat!

english: Okay, I it's the best thing I've ever had wrapped around me, including Phil Huntley!

name: train_dia1017_utt13
chinese: 他很好！
english: He was fine!

english: So your dad dropped by. He's a pleasant man!

name: train_dia1018_utt1
chinese: 哦不

english: Ross I'm so sorry. Okay. I-I will promise I will straighten this out with him tomorrow in person, or via e-mail.

chinese: 瑞秋！

chinese: 好的，我保证。我会解决这个问题。我发誓。我会-我会-我会-我会和她谈谈。
english: All right, I promise. I'll fix this. I swear. I'll-I'll-I'll-I'll talk to her.

name: train_dia1018_utt8
chinese: 好的！

chinese: 好的。

english: Hi, could we get two burritos to go, please?

english: But not that sorry, 'cause you don't have to live with it.
